    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "                    }\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "                }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "            } else"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格\n  const membershipPrices = {\n    yearly: 299,\n    quarterly: 99,\n    monthly: 39\n  }\n\n  // 会员计划对应的描述\n  const membershipDescriptions = {\n    yearly: \"年度会员\",\n    quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n    monthly: \"月度会员\"\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格\n  const membershipPrices = {\n    yearly: 299,\n    quarterly: 99,\n    monthly: 39\n  }\n\n  // 会员计划对应的描述\n  const membershipDescriptions = {\n    yearly: \"年度会员\",\n    quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n    monthly: \"月度会员\"\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = verifyAlipaySign(params);\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付宝回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String tradeStatus = params.get(\"trade_status\");\r\n            if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"success\";\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理支付宝回调异常\", e);\r\n            return \"failure\";\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = verifyAlipaySign(params);\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付宝回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String tradeStatus = params.get(\"trade_status\");\r\n            if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"success\";\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理支付宝回调异常\", e);\r\n            return \"failure\";\r\n        }\r\n    }",

  \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n            \u003c/Card\u003e\n\n            \u003cCard\u003e\n              \u003cCardHeader\u003e\n                \u003cCardTitle\u003e支付方式\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n                \u003cCardDescription\u003e选择您的支付方式\u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n              \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\n              \u003cCardContent\u003e\n                \u003cTabs defaultValue=\"card\"     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            \r\n            // 调用支付宝API\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayResponse response = alipayClient.pageExecute(alipayRequest);\r\n            if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝订单失败：\" + response.getMsg());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码\r\n            String qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(response.getBody());\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)\r\n                    .payUrl(response.getBody())\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",

            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": " "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付状态\r\nexport enum PaymentStatus {\r\n  PENDING = 'PENDING',\r\n  PROCESSING = 'PROCESSING',\r\n  SUCCESS = 'SUCCESS',\r\n  FAILED = 'FAILED',\r\n  CLOSED = 'CLOSED'\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付状态\r\nexport enum PaymentStatus {\r\n  PENDING = 'PENDING',\r\n  PROCESSING = 'PROCESSING',\r\n  SUCCESS = 'SUCCESS',\r\n  FAILED = 'FAILED',\r\n  CLOSED = 'CLOSED'\r\n}",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/wechat', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/alipay', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "// 支付相关 API\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "export const paymentApi = {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  // 获取支付历史\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    \r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  // 微信支付\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    amount: number; \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    membershipType: string; \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    userId?: number;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "    description?: string; \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/wechat', data),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "  // 支付宝支付\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    amount: number; \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    membershipType: string; \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    userId?: number;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    description?: string; \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/alipay', data),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "  // 查询支付状态\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "  // 取消支付\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,

          },

            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 114,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/wechat', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/alipay', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格\n  const membershipPrices = {\n    yearly: 299,\n    quarterly: 99,\n    monthly: 39\n  }\n\n  // 会员计划对应的描述\n  const membershipDescriptions = {\n    yearly: \"年度会员\",\n    quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n    monthly: \"月度会员\"\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use client\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,

          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "export default function PaymentPage() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")"

          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  // 会员计划对应的描述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  const membershipDescriptions = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    yearly: \"年度会员\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    quarterly: \"季度会员\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    monthly: \"月度会员\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格\n  const membershipPrices = {\n    yearly: 299,\n    quarterly: 99,\n    monthly: 39\n  }\n\n  // 会员计划对应的描述\n  const membershipDescriptions = {\n    yearly: \"年度会员\",\n    quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n    monthly: \"月度会员\"\n  }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/app/payment/page.tsx"
      },
      "score": 0.3662109375

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",

          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "text": "        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "    // 构建微信支付回调响应"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: membershipPrices[membershipPlan],\n        membershipType: membershipPlan,\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n      toast({\n        title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      });\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",

          },

            "lineNumber": 143,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "      } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    } else {"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "  };"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: membershipPrices[membershipPlan],\n        membershipType: membershipPlan,\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n      toast({\n        title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      });\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 150
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 50,
            "line": 82
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/app/payment/page.tsx"
      },
      "score": 0.3535155951976776
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 轮询支付状态\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    \n    if (paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 paymentId) {\n      intervalId = setInterval(async () =\u003e {\n        try {\n          const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);\n          const status = response.data.data.status;\n          \n          if (status === \"SUCCESS\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            \n            // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态\n            const userInfo = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\n            if (userInfo) {\n              const userData = JSON.parse(userInfo);\n              userData.membershipType = membershipPlan;\n              userData.membershipExpireDate = response.data.data.expireDate;\n              localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\n            }\n          } else if (status === \"FAIL\" || status === \"CLOSED\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"error\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            toast({\n              title: \"支付失败\",\n              description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\",\n              variant: \"destructive\",\n            });\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"检查支付状态出错\", error);\n        }\n      }, 3000); // 每3秒检查一次\n    }\n    \n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (intervalId) {\n        clearInterval(intervalId);\n      }\n    };\n  }, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan]);",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 轮询支付状态\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    \n    if (paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 paymentId) {\n      intervalId = setInterval(async () =\u003e {\n        try {\n          const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);\n          const status = response.data.data.status;\n          \n          if (status === \"SUCCESS\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            \n            // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态\n            const userInfo = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\n            if (userInfo) {\n              const userData = JSON.parse(userInfo);\n              userData.membershipType = membershipPlan;\n              userData.membershipExpireDate = response.data.data.expireDate;\n              localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\n            }\n          } else if (status === \"FAIL\" || status === \"CLOSED\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"error\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            toast({\n              title: \"支付失败\",\n              description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\",\n              variant: \"destructive\",\n            });\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"检查支付状态出错\", error);\n        }\n      }, 3000); // 每3秒检查一次\n    }\n    \n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (intervalId) {\n        clearInterval(intervalId);\n      }\n    };\n  }, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan]);",

      "codeBlock": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n        ...\n\n\n        {paymentStatus === \"success\" \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cCard\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4 rounded-full bg-green-100 p-3\"\u003e\n                \u003cCheck className=\"h-8 w-8 text-green-600\" /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\u003e支付成功\u003c/h3\u003e\n              \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-2\"\u003e您已成功开通会员服务\u003c/p\u003e\n              \u003cp className=\"text-sm font-medium mb-6\"\u003e\n                {membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]} · ¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}\n              \u003c/p\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-4\"\u003e\n                \u003cButton asChild variant=\"outline\"\u003e\n                  \u003cLink href=\"/courses\"\u003e浏览课程\u003c/Link\u003e\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003cButton asChild\u003e\n                  \u003cLink href=\"/\"\u003e返回首页\u003c/Link\u003e\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\n        )}",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/wechat', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/alipay', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/wechat', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e api.post('/api/payments/alipay', data),\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: membershipPrices[membershipPlan],\n        membershipType: membershipPlan,\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n      toast({\n        title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      });\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: membershipPrices[membershipPlan],\n        membershipType: membershipPlan,\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n      toast({\n        title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      });\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " \r\n        // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createWechatPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付方式为微信支付\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay/notify\")\r\n    public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付同步返回\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/alipay/return\")\r\n    public String alipayReturn(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 验证支付状态，然后重定向到前端页面\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅记录日志并重定向到前端\r\n        return \"redirect:/payment/success\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 微信支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r\n    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**",

        "originalContents": " \r\n        // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createWechatPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付方式为微信支付\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay/notify\")\r\n    public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付同步返回\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/alipay/return\")\r\n    public String alipayReturn(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 验证支付状态，然后重定向到前端页面\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅记录日志并重定向到前端\r\n        return \"redirect:/payment/success\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 微信支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r\n    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",
