        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.ApiResponse;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.validation.Valid;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\r\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentController {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 打印接收到的请求参数\r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝订单请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n       ",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.ApiResponse;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.validation.Valid;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\r\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentController {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 打印接收到的请求参数\r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝订单请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n       ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayApiException;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.DefaultAlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePagePayRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradeQueryRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePagePayResponse;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradeQueryResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.config.PaymentConfig;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.repository.PaymentRepository;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UserService;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPay;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConfig;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConstants;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayUtil;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.BarcodeFormat;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.MultiFormatWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.WriterException;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.client.j2se.MatrixToImageWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.common.BitMatrix;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.SneakyThrows;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.io.FileInputStream;\r\nimport java.io.InputStream;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\nimport java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;\r\nimport java.util.Base64;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport java.util.UUID;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayApiException;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.DefaultAlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePagePayRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradeQueryRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePagePayResponse;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradeQueryResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.config.PaymentConfig;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\");         "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

            "text": "export interface PaymentResponse {\r"

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            \r\n            // 调用支付宝API\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayResponse response = alipayClient.pageExecute(alipayRequest);\r\n            if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝订单失败：\" + response.getMsg());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码\r\n            String qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(response.getBody());\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)\r\n                    .payUrl(response.getBody())\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            \r\n            // 调用支付宝API\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayResponse response = alipayClient.pageExecute(alipayRequest);\r\n            if (!response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝订单失败：\" + response.getMsg());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码\r\n            String qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(response.getBody());\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)\r\n                    .payUrl(response.getBody())\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (AlipayApiException e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建支付宝支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n                  ...\n\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"alipay\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择支付宝后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成支付宝付款码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"wechat\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择微信支付后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成微信支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                \u003c/Tabs\u003e\n              \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n              \u003cCardFooter\u003e\n                \u003cButton \n                  className=\"w-full\" \n                  onClick={handlePayment}\n                  disabled={loading}\n                \u003e\n                  {loading ? (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cLoader2 className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /\u003e\n                      处理中...\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  ) : (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cCreditCard className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n                      支付 ¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  )}\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/CardFooter\u003e\n            \u003c/Card\u003e\n          \u003c/\u003e\n        )}",

        "originalContents": "\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"alipay\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择支付宝后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成支付宝付款码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"wechat\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择微信支付后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成微信支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                \u003c/Tabs\u003e\n              \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n              \u003cCardFooter\u003e\n                \u003cButton \n                  className=\"w-full\" \n                  onClick={handlePayment}\n                  disabled={loading}\n                \u003e\n                  {loading ? (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cLoader2 className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /\u003e\n                      处理中...\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  ) : (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cCreditCard className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n                      支付 ¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  )}\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/CardFooter\u003e\n            \u003c/Card\u003e\n          \u003c/\u003e\n        )}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 读取回调数据\r\n            String xmlData = readXmlFromRequest(request);\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e params = WXPayUtil.xmlToMap(xmlData);\r\n            \r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = WXPayUtil.isSignatureValid(params, paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey());\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"微信支付回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"签名验证失败\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"订单不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String returnCode = params.get(\"return_code\");\r\n            String resultCode = params.get(\"result_code\");",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 读取回调数据\r\n            String xmlData = readXmlFromRequest(request);\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e params = WXPayUtil.xmlToMap(xmlData);\r\n            \r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = WXPayUtil.isSignatureValid(params, paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey());\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"微信支付回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"签名验证失败\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"订单不存在\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String returnCode = params.get(\"return_code\");\r\n            String resultCode = params.get(\"result_code\");",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 59,
            "line": 327
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 296
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    private String wechatCallbackResponse(String returnCode, String returnMsg) {\r\n        try {\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"return_code\", returnCode);\r\n            data.put(\"return_msg\", returnMsg);\r\n            return WXPayUtil.mapToXml(data);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"构建微信支付回调响应异常\", e);\r\n            return \"\u003cxml\u003e\u003creturn_code\u003e\u003c![CDATA[FAIL]]\u003e\u003c/return_code\u003e\u003creturn_msg\u003e\u003c![CDATA[服务器异常]]\u003e\u003c/return_msg\u003e\u003c/xml\u003e\";\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建支付响应\r\n    private PaymentResponse buildPaymentResponse(Payment payment) {\r\n        return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                .outTradeNo(payment.getOutTradeNo())\r\n                .amount(payment.getAmount())\r\n                .status(payment.getStatus())\r\n                .qrCodeUrl(payment.getQrCodeUrl())\r\n                .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                .build();\r\n    }\r\n}",

          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n    private String wechatCallbackResponse(String returnCode, String returnMsg) {\r\n        try {\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"return_code\", returnCode);\r\n            data.put(\"return_msg\", returnMsg);\r\n            return WXPayUtil.mapToXml(data);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"构建微信支付回调响应异常\", e);\r\n            return \"\u003cxml\u003e\u003creturn_code\u003e\u003c![CDATA[FAIL]]\u003e\u003c/return_code\u003e\u003creturn_msg\u003e\u003c![CDATA[服务器异常]]\u003e\u003c/return_msg\u003e\u003c/xml\u003e\";\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建支付响应\r\n    private PaymentResponse buildPaymentResponse(Payment payment) {\r\n        return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                .outTradeNo(payment.getOutTradeNo())\r\n                .amount(payment.getAmount())\r\n                .status(payment.getStatus())\r\n                .qrCodeUrl(payment.getQrCodeUrl())\r\n                .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                .build();\r\n    }\r\n}",

  \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n            \u003c/Card\u003e\n\n            \u003cCard\u003e\n              \u003cCardHeader\u003e\n                \u003cCardTitle\u003e支付方式\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n                \u003cCardDescription\u003e选择您的支付方式\u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n              \u003c/CardHeader\u003e\n              \u003cCardContent\u003e\n                \u003cTabs defaultValue=\"card\" onValueChange={(value) =\u003e setPaymentMethod(value as \"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\")}\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsList className=\"grid w-full grid-cols-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"card\"\u003e银行卡\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n                    \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"alipay\"\u003e支付宝\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n                    \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"wechat\"\u003e微信支付\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsList\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"card\" className=\"space-y-4 pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n                      \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"card-number\"\u003e卡号\u003c/Label\u003e\n                      \u003cInput id=\"card-number\" placeholder=\"1234 5678 9012 3456\" /\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n                        \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"expiry\"\u003e有效期\u003c/Label\u003e\n                        \u003cInput id=\"expiry\" placeholder=\"MM/YY\" /\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n                        \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"cvc\"\u003e安全码\u003c/Label\u003e\n                        \u003cInput id=\"cvc\" placeholder=\"CVC\" /\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n       \u003c/TabsContent\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            \r\n            // 获取二维码链接\r\n            String codeUrl = resp.get(\"code_url\");\r\n            \r\n            // 生成二维码\r\n            String qrCodeUrl = generateQrCode(codeUrl);\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付记录\r\n            payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 返回支付响应\r\n            return PaymentResponse.builder()\r\n                    .paymentId(payment.getId())\r\n                    .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)\r\n                    .amount(request.getAmount())\r\n                    .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)\r\n                    .qrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl)\r\n                    .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())\r\n                    .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())\r\n                    .build();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关类型\r\nexport interface Payment {\r\n  id: number;\r\n  userId: number;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  type: string;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  createdAt: string;\r\n  updatedAt: string;\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = verifyAlipaySign(params);\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付宝回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String tradeStatus = params.get(\"trade_status\");\r\n            if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"success\";\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理支付宝回调异常\", e);\r\n            return \"failure\";\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,

            "column": 1,

      "score": 0.3876953125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r\nserver:\r\n  port: 8090\r\n\r\nspring:\r\n  thymeleaf:\r\n    cache: false\r\n    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r\n    encoding: UTF-8\r\n    suffix: .html\r\n    mode: HTML\r\n  datasource:\r\n    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r\n    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r\n    username: root\r\n    password: 123456\r\n  jackson:\r\n    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r\n    time-zone: GMT+8\r\n    serialization:\r\n      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r\n  # JPA配置\r\n  jpa:\r\n    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r\n    show-sql: true\r\n    hibernate:\r\n      ddl-auto: update\r\n    properties:\r\n      hibernate:\r\n        format_sql: true\r\n\r\n# MyBatis-Plus配置\r\nmybatis-plus:\r\n  global-config:\r\n    db-config:\r\n      logic-delete-field: deleted\r\n      logic-delete-value: 1\r\n      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r\n  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r\n  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r\n  configuration:\r\n    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r\n    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r\n\r\n# 日志配置\r\nlogging:\r\n  level:\r\n    com.example.demo: debug\r\n\r\n# 支付配置\r\npayment:\r\n  # 回调域名\r\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r\n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  wechat:\r\n    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r\n    mch-id: 10000100\r\n    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r\n    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r\n  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  alipay:\r\n    app-id: 2016102700770234\r\n    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r\n    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r\n    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "server:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  port: 8090\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "spring:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  thymeleaf:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    cache: false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    encoding: UTF-8\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    suffix: .html\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    mode: HTML\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  datasource:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    username: root\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    password: 123456\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  jackson:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    time-zone: GMT+8\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    serialization:\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  # JPA配置\r"

            "text": "  jpa:\r"

            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r"

            "lineNumber": 25,

          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "# MyBatis-Plus配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "mybatis-plus:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  global-config:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    db-config:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "      logic-delete-field: deleted\r"

            "lineNumber": 37,

          {

          },

          {

        "originalContents": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r\nserver:\r\n  port: 8090\r\n\r\nspring:\r\n  thymeleaf:\r\n    cache: false\r\n    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r\n    encoding: UTF-8\r\n    suffix: .html\r\n    mode: HTML\r\n  datasource:\r\n    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r\n    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r\n    username: root\r\n    password: 123456\r\n  jackson:\r\n    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r\n    time-zone: GMT+8\r\n    serialization:\r\n      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r\n  # JPA配置\r\n  jpa:\r\n    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r\n    show-sql: true\r\n    hibernate:\r\n      ddl-auto: update\r\n    properties:\r\n      hibernate:\r\n        format_sql: true\r\n\r\n# MyBatis-Plus配置\r\nmybatis-plus:\r\n  global-config:\r\n    db-config:\r\n      logic-delete-field: deleted\r\n      logic-delete-value: 1\r\n      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r\n  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r\n  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r\n  configuration:\r\n    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r\n    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r\n\r\n# 日志配置\r\nlogging:\r\n  level:\r\n    com.example.demo: debug\r\n\r\n# 支付配置\r\npayment:\r\n  # 回调域名\r\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r\n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  wechat:\r\n    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r\n    mch-id: 10000100\r\n    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r\n    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r\n  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  alipay:\r\n    app-id: 2016102700770234\r\n    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r\n    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r\n    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n     * 查询支付状态\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/{paymentId}/status\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e queryPaymentStatus(\r\n            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.queryPaymentStatus(paymentId);\r\n ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "     * 查询支付状态\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "     */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    @GetMapping(\"/{paymentId}/status\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e queryPaymentStatus(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "            @PathVariable Long paymentId) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        \r"

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayApiException;\r\nimport     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r"

            "text": "    // 支付金额\r"

            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r"

            "lineNumber": 21,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    private String membershipType;\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 23,

            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    // 描述信息\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    private String description;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": " "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 32
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "zina-tch/src/main/java/com/example/demo/dto/PaymentRequest.java"
      },
      "score": 0.3427734375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Payments\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"user_id\" property=\"userId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"subscription_id\" property=\"subscriptionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"amount\" property=\"amount\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_method\" property=\"paymentMethod\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"transaction_id\" property=\"transactionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_date\" property=\"paymentDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, user_id, subscription_id, amount, payment_method, transaction_id, status, payment_date, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Payments\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"user_id\" property=\"userId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"subscription_id\" property=\"subscriptionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"amount\" property=\"amount\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_method\" property=\"paymentMethod\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"transaction_id\" property=\"transactionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_date\" property=\"paymentDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, user_id, subscription_id, amount, payment_method, transaction_id, status, payment_date, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    public enum MembershipType {\r\n        YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    public enum MembershipType {\r\n        YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 86

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,

          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "    // 构建微信支付回调响应"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",
