      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.ApiResponse;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.validation.Valid;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\r\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentController {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 打印接收到的请求参数\r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝订单请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n       ",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.ApiResponse;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.validation.Valid;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\r\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentController {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 打印接收到的请求参数\r\n        log.info(\"创建支付宝订单请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n       ",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Payments implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer userId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 关联的订阅ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer subscriptionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付金额\r\n     */\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付方式\r\n     */\r\n    private String paymentMethod;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 交易ID\r\n     */\r\n    private String transactionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date paymentDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {

            "column": 2,

            "column": 1,

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 14,
            "line": 217
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 177
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n ",

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "public interface PaymentService {\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 12,

            "lineNumber": 16,

        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 16
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId) {\r\n        // 查询支付订单\r\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findById(paymentId)\r\n                .orElseThrow(() -\u003e new RuntimeException(\"支付订单不存在\"));\r\n        \r\n        // 只有待支付和处理中的订单可以取消\r\n        if (payment.getStatus() != PaymentStatus.PENDING \u0026\u0026 payment.getStatus() != PaymentStatus.PROCESSING) {\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"当前订单状态不可取消\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 根据支付方式取消订单\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 支付宝取消订单逻辑（简化处理，直接修改状态）\r\n                // 实际项目中，应该调用支付宝的交易关闭接口\r\n            } else if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.WECHAT) {\r\n                // 微信支付取消订单逻辑（简化处理，直接修改状态）\r\n                // 实际项目中，应该调用微信支付的关闭订单接口\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付订单状态\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            return true;\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"取消支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"取消支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId) {\r\n        // 查询支付订单\r\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findById(paymentId)\r\n                .orElseThrow(() -\u003e new RuntimeException(\"支付订单不存在\"));\r\n        \r\n        // 只有待支付和处理中的订单可以取消\r\n        if (payment.getStatus() != PaymentStatus.PENDING \u0026\u0026 payment.getStatus() != PaymentStatus.PROCESSING) {\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"当前订单状态不可取消\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 根据支付方式取消订单\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 支付宝取消订单逻辑（简化处理，直接修改状态）\r\n                // 实际项目中，应该调用支付宝的交易关闭接口\r\n            } else if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.WECHAT) {\r\n                // 微信支付取消订单逻辑（简化处理，直接修改状态）\r\n                // 实际项目中，应该调用微信支付的关闭订单接口\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 更新支付订单状态\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n            paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            return true;\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"取消支付订单异常\", e);\r\n            throw new RuntimeException(\"取消支付订单失败\", e);\r\n        }\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 468
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " \r\n        // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createWechatPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付方式为微信支付\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay/notify\")\r\n    public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付同步返回\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/alipay/return\")\r\n    public String alipayReturn(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 验证支付状态，然后重定向到前端页面\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅记录日志并重定向到前端\r\n        return \"redirect:/payment/success\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 微信支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r\n    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**",

            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r"

            "lineNumber": 96,

            "lineNumber": 97,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": " \r\n        // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createWechatPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody @Valid PaymentRequest request,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未传入用户ID，则从当前登录用户获取\r\n        if (request.getUserId() == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null) {\r\n            // 从Authentication中获取用户ID的逻辑\r\n            // request.setUserId(getUserIdFromAuthentication(authentication));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付方式为微信支付\r\n        request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n        \r\n        PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay/notify\")\r\n    public String alipayNotify(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleAlipayCallback(params);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付宝支付同步返回\r\n     */\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/alipay/return\")\r\n    public String alipayReturn(@RequestParam Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 验证支付状态，然后重定向到前端页面\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅记录日志并重定向到前端\r\n        return \"redirect:/payment/success\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 微信支付回调通知\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat/notify\")\r\n    public String wechatNotify(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return paymentService.handleWechatCallback(request);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**",
        "range": {

        "contents": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r\nserver:\r\n  port: 8090\r\n\r\nspring:\r\n  thymeleaf:\r\n    cache: false\r\n    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r\n    encoding: UTF-8\r\n    suffix: .html\r\n    mode: HTML\r\n  datasource:\r\n    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r\n    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r\n    username: root\r\n    password: 123456\r\n  jackson:\r\n    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r\n    time-zone: GMT+8\r\n    serialization:\r\n      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r\n  # JPA配置\r\n  jpa:\r\n    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r\n    show-sql: true\r\n    hibernate:\r\n      ddl-auto: update\r\n    properties:\r\n      hibernate:\r\n        format_sql: true\r\n\r\n# MyBatis-Plus配置\r\nmybatis-plus:\r\n  global-config:\r\n    db-config:\r\n      logic-delete-field: deleted\r\n      logic-delete-value: 1\r\n      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r\n  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r\n  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r\n  configuration:\r\n    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r\n    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r\n\r\n# 日志配置\r\nlogging:\r\n  level:\r\n    com.example.demo: debug\r\n\r\n# 支付配置\r\npayment:\r\n  # 回调域名\r\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r\n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  wechat:\r\n    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r\n    mch-id: 10000100\r\n    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r\n    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r\n  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  alipay:\r\n    app-id: 2016102700770234\r\n    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r\n    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r\n    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do",

            "text": "    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    time-zone: GMT+8\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    serialization:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  # JPA配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  jpa:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    show-sql: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    hibernate:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      ddl-auto: update\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    properties:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "      hibernate:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        format_sql: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "# MyBatis-Plus配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "mybatis-plus:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  global-config:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    db-config:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "      logic-delete-field: deleted\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "      logic-delete-value: 1\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  configuration:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "# 日志配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "logging:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  level:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    com.example.demo: debug\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "# 支付配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "payment:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "  # 回调域名\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  wechat:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    mch-id: 10000100\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  alipay:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    app-id: 2016102700770234\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r\nserver:\r\n  port: 8090\r\n\r\nspring:\r\n  thymeleaf:\r\n    cache: false\r\n    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r\n    encoding: UTF-8\r\n    suffix: .html\r\n    mode: HTML\r\n  datasource:\r\n    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r\n    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r\n    username: root\r\n    password: 123456\r\n  jackson:\r\n    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r\n    time-zone: GMT+8\r\n    serialization:\r\n      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r\n  # JPA配置\r\n  jpa:\r\n    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r\n    show-sql: true\r\n    hibernate:\r\n      ddl-auto: update\r\n    properties:\r\n      hibernate:\r\n        format_sql: true\r\n\r\n# MyBatis-Plus配置\r\nmybatis-plus:\r\n  global-config:\r\n    db-config:\r\n      logic-delete-field: deleted\r\n      logic-delete-value: 1\r\n      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r\n  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r\n  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r\n  configuration:\r\n    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r\n    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r\n\r\n# 日志配置\r\nlogging:\r\n  level:\r\n    com.example.demo: debug\r\n\r\n# 支付配置\r\npayment:\r\n  # 回调域名\r\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r\n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  wechat:\r\n    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r\n    mch-id: 10000100\r\n    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r\n    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r\n  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  alipay:\r\n    app-id: 2016102700770234\r\n    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r\n    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r\n    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 58,
            "line": 67
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },

      },
      "score": 0.32177734375

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.mysql\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003emysql-connector-j\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cscope\u003eruntime\u003c/scope\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.projectlombok\u003c/groupId\u003e\n \u003cgroupId\u003emysql\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003emysql-connector-java\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e8.0.29\u003c/version\u003e\n   \u003c!-- 支付宝支付SDK --\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.mysql\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003emysql-connector-j\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cscope\u003eruntime\u003c/scope\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.projectlombok\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003elombok\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003coptional\u003etrue\u003c/optional\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.github.wxpay\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ewxpay-sdk\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e0.0.3\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n        \u003c!-- 二维码生成工具 --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n   \u003cversion\u003e3.5.1\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n        \u003c!-- Spring Data JPA --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.boot\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003espring-boot-starter-data-jpa\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.config;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "import org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r"

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "public class PaymentConfig {\r"

            "text": "    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r"

            "text": "    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r"

            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    // 支付回调配置\r"

            "lineNumber": 19,

            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r"

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 54
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "zina-tch/src/main/java/com/example/demo/config/PaymentConfig.java"
      },
      "score": 0.3095703125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n@RestControllerAdvice\r\npublic class GlobalExceptionHandler {\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理参数校验异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(value = {MethodArgumentNotValidException.class, BindException.class})\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleValidException(Exception e) {\r\n        BindingResult bindingResult = null;\r\n        if (e instanceof MethodArgumentNotValidException) {\r\n            bindingResult = ((MethodArgumentNotValidException) e).getBindingResult();\r\n        } else if (e instanceof BindException) {\r\n            bindingResult = ((BindException) e).getBindingResult();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        StringBuilder message = new StringBuilder();\r\n        if (bindingResult != null \u0026\u0026 bindingResult.hasErrors()) {\r\n            FieldError fieldError = bindingResult.getFieldError();\r\n            if (fieldError != null) {\r\n                message.append(fieldError.getDefaultMessage());\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            message.append(\"参数校验失败\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return Result.validateFailed(message.toString());\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理参数类型不匹配异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleMethodArgumentTypeMismatchException(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException e) {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"参数类型错误：\" + e.getName());\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理参数缺失异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(MissingServletRequestParameterException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleMissingServletRequestParameterException(MissingServletRequestParameterException e) {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"缺少必要参数：\" + e.getParameterName());\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理请求体无法解析异常\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "\r\n@RestControllerAdvice\r\npublic class GlobalExceptionHandler {\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理参数校验异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(value = {MethodArgumentNotValidException.class, BindException.class})\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleValidException(Exception e) {\r\n        BindingResult bindingResult = null;\r\n        if (e instanceof MethodArgumentNotValidException) {\r\n            bindingResult = ((MethodArgumentNotValidException) e).getBindingResult();\r\n        } else if (e instanceof BindException) {\r\n            bindingResult = ((BindException) e).getBindingResult();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        StringBuilder message = new StringBuilder();\r\n        if (bindingResult != null \u0026\u0026 bindingResult.hasErrors()) {\r\n            FieldError fieldError = bindingResult.getFieldError();\r\n            if (fieldError != null) {\r\n                message.append(fieldError.getDefaultMessage());\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            message.append(\"参数校验失败\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return Result.validateFailed(message.toString());\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理参数类型不匹配异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleMethodArgumentTypeMismatchException(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException e) {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"参数类型错误：\" + e.getName());\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理参数缺失异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(MissingServletRequestParameterException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleMissingServletRequestParameterException(MissingServletRequestParameterException e) {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"缺少必要参数：\" + e.getParameterName());\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理请求体无法解析异常\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.ExpiredJwtException;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.MalformedJwtException;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.SignatureException;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.authentication.BadCredentialsException;\r\nimport org.springframework.validation.BindException;\r\nimport org.springframework.validation.BindingResult;\r\nimport org.springframework.validation.FieldError;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.MissingServletRequestParameterException;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ExceptionHandler;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.method.annotation.MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 全局异常处理\r\n */",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": " */"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.ExpiredJwtException;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.MalformedJwtException;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.SignatureException;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.authentication.BadCredentialsException;\r\nimport org.springframework.validation.BindException;\r\nimport org.springframework.validation.BindingResult;\r\nimport org.springframework.validation.FieldError;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.MissingServletRequestParameterException;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ExceptionHandler;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.method.annotation.MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 全局异常处理\r\n */",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 26
          },

            "column": 1,

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.DbType;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.MybatisPlusInterceptor;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.PaginationInnerInterceptor;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * MybatisPlus 配置类\r\n */\r\n@Configuration\r\npublic class MybatisPlusConfig {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 分页插件\r\n     */\r\n    @Bean\r\n    public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {\r\n        MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();\r\n        interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL));\r\n        return interceptor;\r\n    }\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.config;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"

            "lineNumber": 12,

          {

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.DbType;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.MybatisPlusInterceptor;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.inner.PaginationInnerInterceptor;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * MybatisPlus 配置类\r\n */\r\n@Configuration\r\npublic class MybatisPlusConfig {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 分页插件\r\n     */\r\n    @Bean\r\n    public MybatisPlusInterceptor mybatisPlusInterceptor() {\r\n        MybatisPlusInterceptor interceptor = new MybatisPlusInterceptor();\r\n        interceptor.addInnerInterceptor(new PaginationInnerInterceptor(DbType.MYSQL));\r\n        return interceptor;\r\n    }\r\n}",

\u003c/dependency\u003e\n\n",

\u003cartifactId\u003evelocity-engine-core\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e2.3\u003c/version\u003e \u003c!-- 推荐版本 --\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n \u003cversion\u003e3.4.1\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.baomidou\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003emybatis-plus-generator\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e3.4.1\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.freemarker\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003efreemarker\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e2.3.30\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.spring4all\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003espring-boot-starter-swagger\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e1.5.1.RELEASE\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003eorg.springframework.boot\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003espring-boot-starter-web\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayApiException;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.DefaultAlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePagePayRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradeQueryRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePagePayResponse;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradeQueryResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.config.PaymentConfig;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.repository.PaymentRepository;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UserService;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPay;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConfig;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConstants;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayUtil;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.BarcodeFormat;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.MultiFormatWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.WriterException;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.client.j2se.MatrixToImageWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.common.BitMatrix;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.SneakyThrows;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.io.FileInputStream;\r\nimport java.io.InputStream;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\nimport java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;\r\nimport java.util.Base64;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport java.util.UUID;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;",

com.alipay.api.AlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.DefaultAlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePagePayRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradeQueryRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePagePayResponse;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradeQueryResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.config.PaymentConfig;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.repository.PaymentRepository;\r\nimport     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\npublic class CodeGenerator {\r\n\r\n\r\n    public static String scanner(String tip) {\r\n        Scanner scanner = new Scanner(System.in);\r\n        StringBuilder help = new StringBuilder();\r\n        help.append(\"请输入\" + tip + \"：\");\r\n        System.out.println(help.toString());\r\n        if (scanner.hasNext()) {\r\n            String ipt = scanner.next();\r\n            if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(ipt)) {\r\n                return ipt;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        throw new MybatisPlusException(\"请输入正确的\" + tip + \"！\");\r\n    }\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    public static void main(String[] args) {\r\n        // 代码生成器\r\n        AutoGenerator mpg = new AutoGenerator();\r\n\r\n        // 全局配置\r\n        GlobalConfig gc = new GlobalConfig();\r\n        String projectPath = System.getProperty(\"user.dir\");\r\n        gc.setOutputDir(projectPath + \"/zina-tch/src/main/java\");//设置代码生成路径\r\n        gc.setFileOverride(true);//是否覆盖以前文件\r\n        gc.setOpen(false);//是否打开生成目录\r\n        gc.setAuthor(\"Zina\");//设置项目作者名称\r\n        gc.setIdType(IdType.AUTO);//设置主键策略\r\n        gc.setBaseResultMap(true);//生成基本ResultMap\r\n        gc.setBaseColumnList(true);//生成基本ColumnList\r\n        gc.setServiceName(\"%sService\");//去掉服务默认前缀\r\n        gc.setDateType(DateType.ONLY_DATE);//设置时间类型\r\n        mpg.setGlobalConfig(gc);\r\n\r\n        // 数据源配置\r\n        DataSourceConfig dsc = new DataSourceConfig();\r\n        dsc.setUrl(\"jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\");\r\n        dsc.setDriverName(\"com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\");\r\n        dsc.setUsername(\"root\");\r\n        dsc.setPassword(\"123456\");\r\n        mpg.setDataSource(dsc);\r\n\r\n        // 包配置\r\n        PackageConfig pc = new PackageConfig();\r\n        pc.setParent(\"com.example.demo\");\r\n        pc.setMapper(\"mapper\");\r\n        pc.setXml(\"mapper.xml\");",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.utils;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.DbType;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.FieldFill;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.exceptions.MybatisPlusException;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.toolkit.StringUtils;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.AutoGenerator;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.DataSourceConfig;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.GlobalConfig;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.PackageConfig;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.StrategyConfig;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.po.TableFill;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.rules.DateType;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.generator.config.rules.NamingStrategy;\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\r\nimport java.util.Scanner;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        pc.setEntity(\"pojo\");\r\n        pc.setService(\"service\");\r\n        pc.setServiceImpl(\"service.impl\");\r\n        pc.setController(\"controller\");\r\n        mpg.setPackageInfo(pc);\r\n\r\n        // 策略配置\r\n        StrategyConfig sc = new StrategyConfig();\r\n        sc.setNaming(NamingStrategy.underline_to_camel);\r\n        sc.setColumnNaming(NamingStrategy.underline_to_camel);\r\n        sc.setEntityLombokModel(true);//自动lombok\r\n        sc.setRestControllerStyle(true);\r\n        sc.setControllerMappingHyphenStyle(true);\r\n\r\n        sc.setLogicDeleteFieldName(\"deleted\");//设置逻辑删除\r\n\r\n        //设置自动填充配置\r\n        TableFill gmt_create = new TableFill(\"create_time\", FieldFill.INSERT);\r\n        TableFill gmt_modified = new TableFill(\"update_time\", FieldFill.INSERT_UPDATE);\r\n        ArrayList\u003cTableFill\u003e tableFills=new ArrayList\u003c\u003e();\r\n        tableFills.add(gmt_create);\r\n        tableFills.add(gmt_modified);\r\n        sc.setTableFillList(tableFills);\r\n\r\n        //乐观锁\r\n        sc.setVersionFieldName(\"version\");\r\n        sc.setRestControllerStyle(true);//驼峰命名\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n        //  sc.setTablePrefix(\"tbl_\"); 设置表名前缀\r\n        sc.setInclude(scanner(\"表名，多个英文逗号分割\").split(\",\"));\r\n        mpg.setStrategy(sc);\r\n\r\n        // 生成代码\r\n        mpg.execute();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        pc.setEntity(\"pojo\");\r\n        pc.setService(\"service\");\r\n        pc.setServiceImpl(\"service.impl\");\r\n        pc.setController(\"controller\");\r\n        mpg.setPackageInfo(pc);\r\n\r\n        // 策略配置\r\n        StrategyConfig sc = new StrategyConfig();\r\n        sc.setNaming(NamingStrategy.underline_to_camel);\r\n        sc.setColumnNaming(NamingStrategy.underline_to_camel);\r\n        sc.setEntityLombokModel(true);//自动lombok\r\n        sc.setRestControllerStyle(true);\r\n        sc.setControllerMappingHyphenStyle(true);\r\n\r\n        sc.setLogicDeleteFieldName(\"deleted\");//设置逻辑删除\r\n\r\n        //设置自动填充配置\r\n        TableFill gmt_create = new TableFill(\"create_time\", FieldFill.INSERT);\r\n        TableFill gmt_modified = new TableFill(\"update_time\", FieldFill.INSERT_UPDATE);\r\n        ArrayList\u003cTableFill\u003e tableFills=new ArrayList\u003c\u003e();\r\n        tableFills.add(gmt_create);\r\n        tableFills.add(gmt_modified);\r\n        sc.setTableFillList(tableFills);\r\n\r\n        //乐观锁\r\n        sc.setVersionFieldName(\"version\");\r\n        sc.setRestControllerStyle(true);//驼峰命名\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n        //  sc.setTablePrefix(\"tbl_\"); 设置表名前缀\r\n        sc.setInclude(scanner(\"表名，多个英文逗号分割\").split(\",\"));\r\n        mpg.setStrategy(sc);\r\n\r\n        // 生成代码\r\n        mpg.execute();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n}",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(HttpMessageNotReadableException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleHttpMessageNotReadableException() {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"请求体不可读或格式错误\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理请求方法不支持异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleHttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException(HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException e) {\r\n        return Result.error(405, \"不支持' \" + e.getMethod() + \"'请求方法\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理认证异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler({ExpiredJwtException.class, SignatureException.class, MalformedJwtException.class})\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleJwtException() {\r\n        return Result.unauthorized();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理授权异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(AccessDeniedException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleAccessDeniedException() {\r\n        return Result.forbidden();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理登录认证异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(BadCredentialsException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleBadCredentialsException() {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码错误\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理其他所有异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(Exception.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleException(Exception e, HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return Result.error(\"服务器内部错误，请联系管理员\");\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(HttpMessageNotReadableException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleHttpMessageNotReadableException() {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"请求体不可读或格式错误\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理请求方法不支持异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleHttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException(HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException e) {\r\n        return Result.error(405, \"不支持' \" + e.getMethod() + \"'请求方法\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理认证异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler({ExpiredJwtException.class, SignatureException.class, MalformedJwtException.class})\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleJwtException() {\r\n        return Result.unauthorized();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理授权异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(AccessDeniedException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleAccessDeniedException() {\r\n        return Result.forbidden();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理登录认证异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(BadCredentialsException.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleBadCredentialsException() {\r\n        return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码错误\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理其他所有异常\r\n     */\r\n    @ExceptionHandler(Exception.class)\r\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)\r\n    public Result\u003cString\u003e handleException(Exception e, HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        return Result.error(\"服务器内部错误，请联系管理员\");\r\n    }\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.CorsRegistry;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Web MVC 配置类\r\n */\r\n@Configuration\r\npublic class WebMvcConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 跨域配置\r\n     */\r\n    @Override\r\n    public void addCorsMappings(CorsRegistry registry) {\r\n        registry.addMapping(\"/**\")\r\n                .allowedOriginPatterns(\"*\")\r\n                .allowedMethods(\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"DELETE\", \"PATCH\", \"OPTIONS\")\r\n                .allowedHeaders(\"*\")\r\n                .allowCredentials(true)\r\n                .maxAge(3600);\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.CorsRegistry;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.servlet.config.annotation.WebMvcConfigurer;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Web MVC 配置类\r\n */\r\n@Configuration\r\npublic class WebMvcConfig implements WebMvcConfigurer {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 跨域配置\r\n     */\r\n    @Override\r\n    public void addCorsMappings(CorsRegistry registry) {\r\n        registry.addMapping(\"/**\")\r\n                .allowedOriginPatterns(\"*\")\r\n                .allowedMethods(\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"DELETE\", \"PATCH\", \"OPTIONS\")\r\n                .allowedHeaders(\"*\")\r\n                .allowCredentials(true)\r\n                .maxAge(3600);\r\n    }\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.mysql\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003emysql-connector-j\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r\nserver:\r\n  port: 8090\r\n\r\nspring:\r\n  thymeleaf:\r\n    cache: false\r\n    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r\n    encoding: UTF-8\r\n    suffix: .html\r\n    mode: HTML\r\n  datasource:\r\n    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r\n    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r\n    username: root\r\n    password: 123456\r\n  jackson:\r\n    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r\n    time-zone: GMT+8\r\n    serialization:\r\n      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r\n  # JPA配置\r\n  jpa:\r\n    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r\n    show-sql: true\r\n    hibernate:\r\n      ddl-auto: update\r\n    properties:\r\n      hibernate:\r\n        format_sql: true\r\n\r\n# MyBatis-Plus配置\r\nmybatis-plus:\r\n  global-config:\r\n    db-config:\r\n      logic-delete-field: deleted\r\n      logic-delete-value: 1\r\n      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r\n  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r\n  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r\n  configuration:\r\n    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r\n    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r\n\r\n# 日志配置\r\nlogging:\r\n  level:\r\n    com.example.demo: debug\r\n\r\n# 支付配置\r\npayment:\r\n  # 回调域名\r\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r\n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  wechat:\r\n    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r\n    mch-id: 10000100\r\n    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r\n    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r\n  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  alipay:\r\n    app-id: 2016102700770234\r\n    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r\n    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r\n    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r"

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "server:\r"

        "originalContents": "# 应用服务 WEB 访问端口\r\nserver:\r\n  port: 8090\r\n\r\nspring:\r\n  thymeleaf:\r\n    cache: false\r\n    prefix: classpath:/templates/\r\n    encoding: UTF-8\r\n    suffix: .html\r\n    mode: HTML\r\n  datasource:\r\n    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/medical_training?useUnicode=true\u0026characterEncoding=utf-8\u0026useSSL=false\u0026serverTimezone=GMT%2B8\r\n    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver\r\n    username: root\r\n    password: 123456\r\n  jackson:\r\n    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\r\n    time-zone: GMT+8\r\n    serialization:\r\n      write-dates-as-timestamps: false\r\n  # JPA配置\r\n  jpa:\r\n    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQL8Dialect\r\n    show-sql: true\r\n    hibernate:\r\n      ddl-auto: update\r\n    properties:\r\n      hibernate:\r\n        format_sql: true\r\n\r\n# MyBatis-Plus配置\r\nmybatis-plus:\r\n  global-config:\r\n    db-config:\r\n      logic-delete-field: deleted\r\n      logic-delete-value: 1\r\n      logic-not-delete-value: 0\r\n  mapper-locations: classpath:com/example/demo/mapper/xml/*.xml\r\n  type-aliases-package: com.example.demo.pojo\r\n  configuration:\r\n    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true\r\n    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl\r\n\r\n# 日志配置\r\nlogging:\r\n  level:\r\n    com.example.demo: debug\r\n\r\n# 支付配置\r\npayment:\r\n  # 回调域名\r\n  callback-host: http://localhost:8090\r\n  # 微信支付配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  wechat:\r\n    app-id: wxd930ea5d5a258f4f\r\n    mch-id: 10000100\r\n    key: 192006250b4c09247ec02edce69f6a2d\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/wechat/notify\r\n    cert-path: classpath:cert/apiclient_cert.p12\r\n  # 支付宝配置（示例配置，需要替换为实际配置）\r\n  alipay:\r\n    app-id: 2016102700770234\r\n    private-key: MIIEvQIBADANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAASCBKcwggSjAgEAAoIBAQCDfUo9S...\r\n    alipay-public-key: MIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAg31KP...\r\n    notify-url: /api/payments/alipay/notify\r\n    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do",

        "contents": "        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.alipay.sdk\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ealipay-sdk-java\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e4.22.57.ALL\u003c/version\u003e\n        \u003c/dependency\u003e\n        \n        \u003c!-- 微信支付SDK --\u003e\n        \u003cdependency\u003e\n            \u003cgroupId\u003ecom.github.wxpay\u003c/groupId\u003e\n            \u003cartifactId\u003ewxpay-sdk\u003c/artifactId\u003e\n            \u003cversion\u003e0.0.3\u003c/version\u003e\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayApiException;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.DefaultAlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePagePayRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradeQueryRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePagePayResponse;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradeQueryResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.config.PaymentConfig;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.repository.PaymentRepository;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UserService;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPay;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConfig;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConstants;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayUtil;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.BarcodeFormat;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.MultiFormatWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.WriterException;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.client.j2se.MatrixToImageWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.common.BitMatrix;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.SneakyThrows;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;\r\nimport java.io.File;\r\nimport java.io.FileInputStream;\r\nimport java.io.InputStream;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\nimport java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;\r\nimport java.util.Base64;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport java.util.UUID;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.alibaba.fastjson.JSON;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayApiException;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.AlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.DefaultAlipayClient;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradePagePayRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.request.AlipayTradeQueryRequest;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradePagePayResponse;\r\nimport com.alipay.api.response.AlipayTradeQueryResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.config.PaymentConfig;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.repository.PaymentRepository;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UserService;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPay;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConfig;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConstants;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayUtil;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.BarcodeFormat;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.MultiFormatWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.WriterException;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.client.j2se.MatrixToImageWriter;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.common.BitMatrix;\r\nimport lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;\r\nimport lombok.SneakyThrows;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\r\n\r\nimport       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r"

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import lombok.Data;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "import javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "import javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "import java.math.BigDecimal;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "@Data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "public class PaymentRequest {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    // 支付金额\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r"

            "lineNumber": 18,

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \r"

            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    private String membershipType;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,

            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    @JsonIgnore\r"

            "lineNumber": 26,

            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    private String description;\r"
