      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            // 设置用户ID\r\n            Long userId = null;\r\n            // 首先从请求参数中获取userId\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n                Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n                if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    userId = ((Number) userIdObj).longValue();\r\n                } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        userId = Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj);\r\n                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 如果请求参数中没有userId，尝试从认证信息获取\r\n            if (userId == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null \u0026\u0026 authentication.getPrincipal() != null) {\r\n                // 根据您的用户对象结构获取userId\r\n                Object principal = authentication.getPrincipal();\r\n                // 这里需要根据您的实际用户对象类型进行转换\r\n                try {\r\n                    if (principal instanceof org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User) {\r\n                        // 从用户名中获取ID或其他操作\r\n                        String username = ((org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User) principal).getUsername();\r\n                        log.info(\"已从认证信息获取用户名: {}\", username);\r\n                        // 这里可以根据用户名查询用户ID\r\n                        // userId = userService.findIdByUsername(username);\r\n                    } else if (principal.toString().matches(\"\\\\d+\")) {\r\n                        // 尝试直接解析为数字\r\n                        userId = Long.parseLong(principal.toString());\r\n       ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            // 设置金额\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n                Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n                if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n                } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置会员类型\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n                request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置描述\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n                request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置用户ID\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n                Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n                if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setUserId(((Number) userIdObj).longValue());\r\n                } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        request.setUserId(Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj));\r\n                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            log.info(\"处理后的请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n            log.info(\"支付金额类型: {}, 值: {}\", request.getAmount() != null ? request.getAmount().getClass().getName() : \"null\", request.getAmount());\r\n            log.info(\"会员类型: {}\", request.getMembershipType());\r\n            \r\n            // 设置支付方式为微信支付\r\n            request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            \r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            // 记录详细错误信息\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(ApiResponse.badRequest(e.getMessage()));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            // 设置金额\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n                Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n                if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n                } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置会员类型\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n                request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置描述\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n                request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置用户ID\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n                Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n                if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setUserId(((Number) userIdObj).longValue());\r\n                } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        request.setUserId(Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj));\r\n                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            log.info(\"处理后的请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n            log.info(\"支付金额类型: {}, 值: {}\", request.getAmount() != null ? request.getAmount().getClass().getName() : \"null\", request.getAmount());\r\n            log.info(\"会员类型: {}\", request.getMembershipType());\r\n            \r\n            // 设置支付方式为微信支付\r\n            request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            \r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createWechatPayment(request);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            // 记录详细错误信息\r\n            log.error(\"创建微信支付订单失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(ApiResponse.badRequest(e.getMessage()));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": " {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    public PaymentController(PaymentService paymentService, @Qualifier(\"customObjectMapper\") ObjectMapper objectMapper) {\r\n        this.paymentService = paymentService;\r\n        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap,\r\n            HttpServletRequest httpRequest,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 记录原始请求参数\r\n            log.info(\"支付宝支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n            \r\n            // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n            PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();\r\n            \r\n            // 设置金额\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n                Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n                if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n                } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置会员类型\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n                request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置描述\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n                request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": " {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": " {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\r\n    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;\r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PaymentController.class);\r\n    \r\n    public PaymentController(PaymentService paymentService, @Qualifier(\"customObjectMapper\") ObjectMapper objectMapper) {\r\n        this.paymentService = paymentService;\r\n        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/alipay\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createAlipayPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap,\r\n            HttpServletRequest httpRequest,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 记录原始请求参数\r\n            log.info(\"支付宝支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n            \r\n            // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n            PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();\r\n            \r\n            // 设置金额\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"amount\")) {\r\n                Object amountObj = requestMap.get(\"amount\");\r\n                if (amountObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);\r\n                } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置会员类型\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"membershipType\")) {\r\n                request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get(\"membershipType\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 设置描述\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"description\")) {\r\n                request.setDescription(requestMap.get(\"description\").toString());\r\n            }\r\n            ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 70
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 31,
            "line": 24
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "zina-tch/src/main/java/com/example/demo/controller/PaymentController.java"
      },
      "score": 0.2861328125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r"

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": " {\r\n    \r\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RequestLoggingFilter.class);\r\n    \r\n    private static final List\u003cString\u003e LOGGABLE_CONTENT_TYPES = \r\n            Collections.unmodifiableList(Arrays.asList(\r\n                    \"application/json\",\r\n                    \"application/xml\",\r\n                    \"application/x-www-form-urlencoded\",\r\n                    \"text/plain\"\r\n            ));\r\n    \r\n    // 只记录支付相关的API日志\r\n    private static final List\u003cString\u003e PAYMENT_API_PATHS = \r\n            Collections.unmodifiableList(Arrays.asList(\r\n                    \"/api/payments/alipay\",\r\n                    \"/api/payments/wechat\"\r\n            ));\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain)\r\n            throws ServletException, IOException",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 尝试更改Content-Type为表单数据\r\n    return api.post('/api/payments/wechat', \r\n      JSON.stringify(paymentData), \r\n      { \r\n        headers: { \r\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8'\r\n        } \r\n      }\r\n    );\r\n  },",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,

          },

            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "// 支付相关 API\r"

            "lineNumber": 79,

            "text": "  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r"

            "lineNumber": 82,

          },

            "lineNumber": 83,

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 85,

          },

            "lineNumber": 86,

            "lineNumber": 87,

            "lineNumber": 90,

            "lineNumber": 92,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  }) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    // 确保数据格式正确\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,

            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "      ...data,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    };\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r"

            "lineNumber": 101,

          {

            "lineNumber": 105,

          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "  },"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 尝试更改Content-Type为表单数据\r\n    return api.post('/api/payments/wechat', \r\n      JSON.stringify(paymentData), \r\n      { \r\n        headers: { \r\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8'\r\n        } \r\n      }\r\n    );\r\n  },",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 111
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 76
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/lib/api.ts"
      },
      "score": 0.26953125
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const paymentApi = {\n...\nconst paymentApi = {\n...\npaymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\n\r\n  \r\n  ...\n\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 测试请求 - 先调用echo接口测试连接\n      try {\n        const testResponse = await fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/test/echo', {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            test: 'Hello World',\n            time: new Date().toISOString()\n          })\n        });\n        \n        const testResult = await testResponse.json();\n        console.log('测试响应:', testResult);\n      } catch (testError) {\n        console.error('测试请求失败:', testError);\n      }\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      \n      // 确保金额是字符串格式，会员类型大写\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: String(membershipPrices[membershipPlan]), // 确保是字符串\n        membershipType: membershipPlan.toUpperCase(), // 转为大写以匹配后端枚举\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      console.log('准备发送支付请求:', paymentData);\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 测试请求 - 先调用echo接口测试连接\n      try {\n        const testResponse = await fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/test/echo', {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            test: 'Hello World',\n            time: new Date().toISOString()\n          })\n        });\n        \n        const testResult = await testResponse.json();\n        console.log('测试响应:', testResult);\n      } catch (testError) {\n        console.error('测试请求失败:', testError);\n      }\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      \n      // 确保金额是字符串格式，会员类型大写\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: String(membershipPrices[membershipPlan]), // 确保是字符串\n        membershipType: membershipPlan.toUpperCase(), // 转为大写以匹配后端枚举\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      console.log('准备发送支付请求:', paymentData);\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 143
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 50,
            "line": 82
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/app/payment/page.tsx"
      },
      "score": 0.2646484375
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Configuration\r\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \"payment\")\r\npublic class PaymentConfig {\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private WechatPayConfig wechat = new WechatPayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝支付配置\r\n    private AlipayConfig alipay = new AlipayConfig();\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调配置\r\n    private String callbackHost;\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class WechatPayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户号\r\n        private String mchId;\r\n        // 商户API密钥\r\n        private String key;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 证书路径\r\n        private String certPath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @Data\r\n    public static class AlipayConfig {\r\n        // 应用ID\r\n        private String appId;\r\n        // 商户私钥\r\n        private String privateKey;\r\n        // 支付宝公钥\r\n        private String alipayPublicKey;\r\n        // 回调地址\r\n        private String notifyUrl;\r\n        // 支付宝网关地址，沙箱环境：https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\r\n        private String gatewayUrl = \"https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do\";\r\n        // 编码\r\n        private String charset = \"UTF-8\";\r\n        // 返回格式\r\n        private String format = \"json\";\r\n        // 签名方式\r\n        private String signType = \"RSA2\";\r\n    }\r\n}",

+                 // 根据您的用户对象结构获取userId

+                 // 这里需要根据您的实际用户对象类型进行转换
+                 try {

+             }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Payments implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer userId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 关联的订阅ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer subscriptionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付金额\r\n     */\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付方式\r\n     */\r\n    private String paymentMethod;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 交易ID\r\n     */\r\n    private String transactionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date paymentDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

            "text": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r"

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Payments implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer userId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 关联的订阅ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer subscriptionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付金额\r\n     */\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付方式\r\n     */\r\n    private String paymentMethod;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 交易ID\r\n     */\r\n    private String transactionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date paymentDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {

            "column": 2,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",
        "range": {

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Slf4j\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支持字符串格式的金额设置\r\n     * 这个方法会被Jackson调用如果JSON中的amount是字符串\r\n     */\r\n    @JsonProperty(\"amount\")\r\n    public void setAmountStr(String amount) {\r\n        try {\r\n            log.info(\"接收到字符串格式的金额: {}\", amount);\r\n            this.amount = new BigDecimal(amount);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"转换金额字符串失败: {}\", amount, e);\r\n            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"金额格式不正确: \" + amount);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 获取枚举类型的会员类型",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.MembershipType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\n\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.NotNull;\r\nimport javax.validation.constraints.Positive;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Slf4j\r\npublic class PaymentRequest {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"支付金额不能为空\")\r\n    @Positive(message = \"支付金额必须大于0\")\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员类型 - 接收字符串格式\r\n    @NotNull(message = \"会员类型不能为空\")\r\n    private String membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付方式 - 由控制器根据接口自动设置\r\n    @JsonIgnore\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 描述信息\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID (可选，如果已登录则从Token中获取)\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 支持字符串格式的金额设置\r\n     * 这个方法会被Jackson调用如果JSON中的amount是字符串\r\n     */\r\n    @JsonProperty(\"amount\")\r\n    public void setAmountStr(String amount) {\r\n        try {\r\n            log.info(\"接收到字符串格式的金额: {}\", amount);\r\n            this.amount = new BigDecimal(amount);\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"转换金额字符串失败: {}\", amount, e);\r\n            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"金额格式不正确: \" + amount);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 获取枚举类型的会员类型",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.util.ApiResponse;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\r\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\r\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.validation.Valid;\r\nimport java.io.BufferedReader;\r\nimport java.io.IOException;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\r\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\r\n\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/payments\")\r\npublic class PaymentController",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r"
          },
          {

com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentType;\r\nimport com.example.demo.repository.PaymentRepository;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UserService;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPay;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConfig;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayConstants;\r\nimport com.github.wxpay.sdk.WXPayUtil;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.BarcodeFormat;\r\nimport com.google.zxing.MultiFormatWriter;\r\nimport lombok.SneakyThrows;\r\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\r\n\r\nimport       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "             }\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"从认证信息获取用户ID失败: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 如果仍未获取到userId，设置默认值为1\r\n            if (userId == null) {\r\n                userId = 1L; // 设置默认用户ID，避免数据库约束错误\r\n                log.warn(\"未找到用户ID，使用默认ID: {}\", userId);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            request.setUserId(userId);\r\n            \r\n            log.info(\"处理后的请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n            log.info(\"支付金额类型: {}, 值: {}\", request.getAmount() != null ? request.getAmount().getClass().getName() : \"null\", request.getAmount());\r\n            log.info(\"会员类型: {}\", request.getMembershipType());\r\n            log.info(\"用户ID: {}\", request.getUserId());\r\n            \r\n            // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n            request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            \r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            // 记录详细错误信息\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝订单失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(ApiResponse.badRequest(e.getMessage()));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createWechatPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap,\r\n            HttpServletRequest httpRequest,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 记录原始请求参数\r\n            log.info(\"微信支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n            \r\n            // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n            P",

        "originalContents": "             }\r\n                } catch (Exception e) {\r\n                    log.warn(\"从认证信息获取用户ID失败: {}\", e.getMessage());\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 如果仍未获取到userId，设置默认值为1\r\n            if (userId == null) {\r\n                userId = 1L; // 设置默认用户ID，避免数据库约束错误\r\n                log.warn(\"未找到用户ID，使用默认ID: {}\", userId);\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            request.setUserId(userId);\r\n            \r\n            log.info(\"处理后的请求参数: {}\", request);\r\n            log.info(\"支付金额类型: {}, 值: {}\", request.getAmount() != null ? request.getAmount().getClass().getName() : \"null\", request.getAmount());\r\n            log.info(\"会员类型: {}\", request.getMembershipType());\r\n            log.info(\"用户ID: {}\", request.getUserId());\r\n            \r\n            // 设置支付方式为支付宝\r\n            request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            \r\n            PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(response));\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            // 记录详细错误信息\r\n            log.error(\"创建支付宝订单失败: {}\", e.getMessage(), e);\r\n            return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(ApiResponse.badRequest(e.getMessage()));\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/wechat\")\r\n    public ResponseEntity\u003cApiResponse\u003cPaymentResponse\u003e\u003e createWechatPayment(\r\n            @RequestBody Map\u003cString, Object\u003e requestMap,\r\n            HttpServletRequest httpRequest,\r\n            Authentication authentication) {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 记录原始请求参数\r\n            log.info(\"微信支付请求参数: {}\", requestMap);\r\n            \r\n            // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象\r\n            P",

        "originalContents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Payments\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"user_id\" property=\"userId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"subscription_id\" property=\"subscriptionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"amount\" property=\"amount\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_method\" property=\"paymentMethod\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"transaction_id\" property=\"transactionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_date\" property=\"paymentDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, user_id, subscription_id, amount, payment_method, transaction_id, status, payment_date, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            // 设置用户ID\r\n            Long userId = null;\r\n            // 首先从请求参数中获取userId\r\n            if (requestMap.containsKey(\"userId\")) {\r\n                Object userIdObj = requestMap.get(\"userId\");\r\n                if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {\r\n                    userId = ((Number) userIdObj).longValue();\r\n                } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        userId = Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj);\r\n                    } catch (NumberFormatException e) {\r\n                        log.warn(\"无法解析用户ID: {}\", userIdObj);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 如果请求参数中没有userId，尝试从认证信息获取\r\n            if (userId == null \u0026\u0026 authentication != null \u0026\u0026 authentication.getPrincipal() != null) {\r\n                // 根据您的用户对象结构获取userId\r\n                Object principal = authentication.getPrincipal();\r\n                // 这里需要根据您的实际用户对象类型进行转换\r\n                try {\r\n                    if (principal instanceof org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User) {\r\n                        // 从用户名中获取ID或其他操作\r\n                        String username = ((org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User) principal).getUsername();\r\n                        log.info(\"已从认证信息获取用户名: {}\", username);\r\n                        // 这里可以根据用户名查询用户ID\r\n                        // userId = userService.findIdByUsername(username);\r\n                    } else if (principal.toString().matches(\"\\\\d+\")) {\r\n                        // 尝试直接解析为数字\r\n                        userId = Long.parseLong(principal.toString());\r\n       ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",

        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentRequest;\r\nimport com.example.demo.dto.PaymentResponse;\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\npublic interface PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建支付宝支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建微信支付订单\r\n     * @param request 支付请求\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理支付宝支付回调\r\n     * @param params 回调参数\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理微信支付回调\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 处理结果\r\n     */\r\n    String handleWechatCallback(HttpServletRequest request);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 查询支付订单状态\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 支付响应\r\n     */\r\n    PaymentResponse queryPaymentStatus(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 取消支付订单\r\n     * @param paymentId 支付ID\r\n     * @return 取消结果\r\n     */\r\n    boolean cancelPayment(Long paymentId);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成支付二维码\r\n     * @param content 二维码内容\r\n     * @return 二维码图片Base64编码\r\n     */\r\n    String generateQrCode(String content);\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新用户会员信息\r\n     * @param payment 支付订单\r\n     */\r\n    void updateUserMembership(Payment payment);\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 66
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "zina-tch/src/main/java/com/example/demo/service/PaymentService.java"
      },
      "score": 0.3134765625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            if (payment.getPaymentType() == PaymentType.ALIPAY) {\r\n                // 查询支付宝订单状态\r\n                AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryRequest request = new AlipayTradeQueryRequest();\r\n                \r\n                Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n                bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", payment.getOutTradeNo());\r\n                \r\n                request.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));\r\n                AlipayTradeQueryResponse response = alipayClient.execute(request);\r\n                \r\n                if (response.isSuccess()) {\r\n                    String tradeStatus = response.getTradeStatus();\r\n                    if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付成功\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                        payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                        \r\n                        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                        updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                    } else if (\"TRADE_CLOSED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                        // 支付关闭\r\n                        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.CLOSED);\r\n                        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            } else",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.dto;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus;\r\nimport lombok.Builder;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Builder\r\npublic class PaymentResponse {\r\n    \r\n    // 支付订单ID\r\n    private Long paymentId;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 二维码URL (微信支付和支付宝支付)\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付页面URL (支付宝手机网页支付)\r\n    private String payUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付过期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 37
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 107,

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建支付宝请求参数\r\n            AlipayClient alipayClient = getAlipayClient();\r\n            AlipayTradePagePayRequest alipayRequest = new AlipayTradePagePayRequest();\r\n            alipayRequest.setReturnUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/return\");\r\n            alipayRequest.setNotifyUrl(paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/alipay/notify\");\r\n            \r\n            // 构建请求业务参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e bizParams = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            bizParams.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            bizParams.put(\"product_code\", \"FAST_INSTANT_TRADE_PAY\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"total_amount\", request.getAmount().toString());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"subject\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            bizParams.put(\"body\", request.getDescription());\r\n            bizParams.put(\"timeout_express\", \"30m\"); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 将业务参数转为JSON字符串\r\n            alipayRequest.setBizContent(JSON.toJSONString(bizParams));",
        "range": {

            "column": 71,
            "line": 145

            "column": 6,
            "line": 106
          }
