    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public void updateUserMembership(Payment payment) {\r\n        // 根据会员类型设置会员有效期\r\n        LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n        switch (payment.getMembershipType()) {\r\n            case YEARLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusYears(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            case QUARTERLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(3);\r\n                break;\r\n            case MONTHLY:\r\n                expireTime = LocalDateTime.now().plusMonths(1);\r\n                break;\r\n            default:\r\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"无效的会员类型\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新用户会员信息\r\n        userService.updateMembership(payment.getUserId(), payment.getMembershipType().name(), expireTime);\r\n        \r\n        // 设置支付订单的过期时间\r\n        payment.setExpireTime(expireTime);\r\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // --- 辅助方法 ---\r\n    \r\n    // 生成交易单号\r\n    private String generateTradeNo() {\r\n        String uuid = UUID.randomUUID().toString().replaceAll(\"-\", \"\").substring(0, 16);\r\n        String timestamp = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\"));\r\n        return timestamp + uuid;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 验证支付宝签名\r\n    private boolean verifyAlipaySign(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该使用支付宝SDK进行签名验证\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 读取微信支付回调XML数据\r\n    private String readXmlFromRequest(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 实际项目中，应该从request中读取XML数据\r\n        // 此处简化实现，仅供示例\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 构建微信支付回调响应",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "// 支付响应\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "export interface PaymentResponse {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "  paymentId: number;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  outTradeNo: string;\r"

            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "  amount: number;\r"

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付响应\r\nexport interface PaymentResponse {\r\n  paymentId: number;\r\n  outTradeNo: string;\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  status: PaymentStatus;\r\n  qrCodeUrl?: string;\r\n  payUrl?: string;\r\n  createdTime: string;\r\n  expireTime: string;\r\n}",

          "endPosition": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@Slf4j\r\n@Service\r\n@RequiredArgsConstructor\r\npublic class PaymentServiceImpl implements PaymentService {\r\n    \r\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\r\n    private final PaymentConfig paymentConfig;\r\n    private final UserService userService;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付宝客户端\r\n    private AlipayClient getAlipayClient() {\r\n        return new DefaultAlipayClient(\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getGatewayUrl(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getFormat(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getCharset(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAlipayPublicKey(),\r\n                paymentConfig.getAlipay().getSignType()\r\n        );\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 微信支付配置\r\n    private class WXPayConfigImpl implements WXPayConfig {\r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getAppID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getAppId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getMchID() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getMchId();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public String getKey() {\r\n            return paymentConfig.getWechat().getKey();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @SneakyThrows\r\n        @Override\r\n        public InputStream getCertStream() {\r\n            if (paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath() != null) {\r\n                return new FileInputStream(new File(paymentConfig.getWechat().getCertPath()));\r\n            }\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpConnectTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 8000;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        @Override\r\n        public int getHttpReadTimeoutMs() {\r\n            return 10000;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n            if (\"SUCCESS\".equals(returnCode) \u0026\u0026 \"SUCCESS\".equals(resultCode)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(xmlData);\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"SUCCESS\", \"OK\");\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(xmlData);\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"支付失败\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理微信支付回调异常\", e);\r\n            return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"服务器异常\");\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            if (\"SUCCESS\".equals(returnCode) \u0026\u0026 \"SUCCESS\".equals(resultCode)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(xmlData);\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"SUCCESS\", \"OK\");\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(xmlData);\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"支付失败\");\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理微信支付回调异常\", e);\r\n            return wechatCallbackResponse(\"FAIL\", \"服务器异常\");\r\n        }\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = verifyAlipaySign(params);\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付宝回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String tradeStatus = params.get(\"trade_status\");\r\n            if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"success\";\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理支付宝回调异常\", e);\r\n            return \"failure\";\r\n        }\r\n    }",

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public String handleAlipayCallback(Map\u003cString, String\u003e params) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 验证签名\r\n            boolean signVerified = verifyAlipaySign(params);\r\n            if (!signVerified) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付宝回调签名验证失败\");\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // 获取支付订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = params.get(\"out_trade_no\");\r\n            \r\n            // 查询订单\r\n            Optional\u003cPayment\u003e paymentOpt = paymentRepository.findByOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            if (!paymentOpt.isPresent()) {\r\n                log.error(\"支付订单不存在：{}\", outTradeNo);\r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            Payment payment = paymentOpt.get();\r\n            \r\n            // 判断支付状态\r\n            String tradeStatus = params.get(\"trade_status\");\r\n            if (\"TRADE_SUCCESS\".equals(tradeStatus) || \"TRADE_FINISHED\".equals(tradeStatus)) {\r\n                // 支付成功\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.SUCCESS);\r\n                payment.setPaidTime(LocalDateTime.now());\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                // 更新用户会员信息\r\n                updateUserMembership(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"success\";\r\n            } else {\r\n                // 其他状态\r\n                payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\r\n                payment.setCallbackData(params.toString());\r\n                paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n                \r\n                return \"failure\";\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            log.error(\"处理支付宝回调异常\", e);\r\n            return \"failure\";\r\n        }\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 296
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 245
          }
        },

      },

        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    public enum MembershipType {\r\n        YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    }\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\"); // 转换为分\r\n            data.put(\"spbill_create_ip\", \"127.0.0.1\"); // 服务器IP\r\n            data.put(\"notify_url\", paymentConfig.getCallbackHost() + \"/api/payments/wechat/notify\");\r\n            data.put(\"trade_type\", \"NATIVE\"); // 网页扫码支付\r\n            \r\n            // 调用微信支付API\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e resp = wxPay.unifiedOrder(data);\r\n            \r\n            if (!\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"return_code\")) || !\"SUCCESS\".equals(resp.get(\"result_code\"))) {\r\n                throw new RuntimeException(\"创建微信支付订单失败：\" + resp.get(\"return_msg\"));\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    @Transactional\r\n    public PaymentResponse createWechatPayment(PaymentRequest request) {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 生成外部订单号\r\n            String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();\r\n            \r\n            // 创建支付实体并保存\r\n            Payment payment = new Payment();\r\n            payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());\r\n            payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());\r\n            payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.WECHAT);\r\n            payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());\r\n            payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());\r\n            payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);\r\n            payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\r\n            payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期\r\n            \r\n            // 保存支付记录\r\n            payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);\r\n            \r\n            // 初始化微信支付\r\n            WXPay wxPay = new WXPay(new WXPayConfigImpl(), WXPayConstants.SignType.MD5);\r\n            \r\n            // 构建微信支付请求参数\r\n            Map\u003cString, String\u003e data = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n            data.put(\"body\", \"医护培训平台会员订阅\");\r\n            data.put(\"out_trade_no\", outTradeNo);\r\n            data.put(\"total_fee\", request.getAmount().multiply(new BigDecimal(\"100\")).intValue() + \"\");     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r"

            "text": "import java.math.BigDecimal;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import java.time.LocalDateTime;\r"

            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.entity;\r\n\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\n\r\nimport javax.persistence.*;\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport java.time.LocalDateTime;\r\n\r\n@Data\r\n@Entity\r\n@Table(name = \"payments\")\r\npublic class Payment {\r\n    \r\n    @Id\r\n    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)\r\n    private Long id;\r\n    \r\n    // 外部支付单号\r\n    private String outTradeNo;\r\n    \r\n    // 用户ID\r\n    private Long userId;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付金额\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付类型: WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentType paymentType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付状态: PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private PaymentStatus status;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付会员类型: YEARLY, QUARTERLY, MONTHLY\r\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\r\n    private MembershipType membershipType;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付描述\r\n    private String description;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付完成时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime paidTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 创建时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime createdTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 更新时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime updatedTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 会员到期时间\r\n    private LocalDateTime expireTime;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付二维码URL\r\n    private String qrCodeUrl;\r\n    \r\n    // 支付回调数据\r\n    @Column(columnDefinition = \"TEXT\")\r\n    private String callbackData;\r\n    \r\n    @PrePersist\r\n    public void prePersist() {\r\n        this.createdTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n        if (this.status == null) {\r\n            this.status = PaymentStatus.PENDING;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @PreUpdate\r\n    public void preUpdate() {\r\n        this.updatedTime = LocalDateTime.now();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentType {\r\n        WECHAT, ALIPAY, CARD\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    public enum PaymentStatus {\r\n        PENDING, PROCESSING, SUCCESS, FAILED, CLOSED\r\n    }",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Payments implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer userId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 关联的订阅ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer subscriptionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付金额\r\n     */\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付方式\r\n     */\r\n    private String paymentMethod;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 交易ID\r\n     */\r\n    private String transactionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date paymentDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Payments implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer userId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 关联的订阅ID\r\n     */\r\n    private Integer subscriptionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付金额\r\n     */\r\n    private BigDecimal amount;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付方式\r\n     */\r\n    private String paymentMethod;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 交易ID\r\n     */\r\n    private String transactionId;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 支付时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date paymentDate;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 69

            "column": 1,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE payments (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    subscription_id INT COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',\n    amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT '支付金额',\n    payment_method ENUM('alipay', 'wechat', 'bank_card') NOT NULL COMMENT '支付方式',\n    transaction_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '交易ID',\n    status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' COMMENT '支付状态',\n    payment_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '支付时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (subscription_id) REFERENCES subscriptions(id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_payment_date (payment_date)\n) COMMENT='支付记录表';\n\n-- 视频分类表\nCREATE TABLE video_categories (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '分类描述',\n    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父分类ID',\n    display_order INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '显示顺序',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),\n    INDEX idx_display_order (display_order)\n) COMMENT='视频分类表';\n\n-- 讲师表\nCREATE TABLE instructors (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '讲师姓名',\n    title VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '职称',\n    organization VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '所属机构',\n    bio TEXT COMMENT '个人简介',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE payments ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    subscription_id INT COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT '支付金额',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    payment_method ENUM('alipay', 'wechat', 'bank_card') NOT NULL COMMENT '支付方式',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    transaction_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '交易ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' COMMENT '支付状态',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    payment_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '支付时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (subscription_id) REFERENCES subscriptions(id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_status (status),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_payment_date (payment_date)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": ") COMMENT='支付记录表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "-- 视频分类表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE video_categories ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类名称',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    description TEXT COMMENT '分类描述',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父分类ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    display_order INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '显示顺序',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_display_order (display_order)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": ") COMMENT='视频分类表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "-- 讲师表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE instructors ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '讲师姓名',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    title VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '职称',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    organization VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '所属机构',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    bio TEXT COMMENT '个人简介',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE payments (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    subscription_id INT COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',\n    amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT '支付金额',\n    payment_method ENUM('alipay', 'wechat', 'bank_card') NOT NULL COMMENT '支付方式',\n    transaction_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '交易ID',\n    status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' COMMENT '支付状态',\n    payment_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '支付时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (subscription_id) REFERENCES subscriptions(id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_payment_date (payment_date)\n) COMMENT='支付记录表';\n\n-- 视频分类表\nCREATE TABLE video_categories (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '分类描述',\n    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父分类ID',\n    display_order INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '显示顺序',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),\n    INDEX idx_display_order (display_order)\n) COMMENT='视频分类表';\n\n-- 讲师表\nCREATE TABLE instructors (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '讲师姓名',\n    title VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '职称',\n    organization VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '所属机构',\n    bio TEXT COMMENT '个人简介',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 86
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 44
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "file.txt"
      },
      "score": 0.3535155951976776
    },

        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Payments\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"user_id\" property=\"userId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"subscription_id\" property=\"subscriptionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"amount\" property=\"amount\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_method\" property=\"paymentMethod\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"transaction_id\" property=\"transactionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_date\" property=\"paymentDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, user_id, subscription_id, amount, payment_method, transaction_id, status, payment_date, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Payments\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"user_id\" property=\"userId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"subscription_id\" property=\"subscriptionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"amount\" property=\"amount\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_method\" property=\"paymentMethod\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"transaction_id\" property=\"transactionId\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"payment_date\" property=\"paymentDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, user_id, subscription_id, amount, payment_method, transaction_id, status, payment_date, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

 (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;user_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\r\n  &#96;video_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\r\n  &#96;score&#96; tinyint(4) NOT NULL COMMENT '评分(1-5)',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  UNIQUE INDEX &#96;uk_user_video&#96;(&#96;user_id&#96; ASC, &#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_video_id&#96;(&#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;ratings_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;user_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;users&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;ratings_ibfk_2&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;video_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;videos&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r\n) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 20 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '视频评分表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Records of ratings\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;ratings&#96;           {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "-- ----------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;ratings&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE &#96;ratings&#96;  (\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "  &#96;user_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "  &#96;video_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "  &#96;score&#96; tinyint(4) NOT NULL COMMENT '评分(1-5)',\r"
          },

            "text": "  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "  UNIQUE INDEX &#96;uk_user_video&#96;(&#96;user_id&#96; ASC, &#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "  INDEX &#96;idx_video_id&#96;(&#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "  CONSTRAINT &#96;ratings_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;user_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;users&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "  CONSTRAINT &#96;ratings_ibfk_2&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;video_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;videos&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": ") ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 20 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '视频评分表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r"

ASC, &#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_video_id&#96;(&#96;video_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;ratings_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;user_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;users&#96;         "contents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.repository;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.entity.Payment;\r\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Repository;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Optional;\r\n\r\n@Repository\r\npublic interface PaymentRepository extends JpaRepository\u003cPayment, Long\u003e {\r\n    \r\n    // 根据外部交易号查询\r\n    Optional\u003cPayment\u003e findByOutTradeNo(String outTradeNo);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID查询所有支付记录\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdOrderByCreatedTimeDesc(Long userId);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据用户ID和支付状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByUserIdAndStatus(Long userId, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n    \r\n    // 根据支付类型和状态查询\r\n    List\u003cPayment\u003e findByPaymentTypeAndStatus(Payment.PaymentType paymentType, Payment.PaymentStatus status);\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "-- 创建数据库\nCREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS medical_training CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\nUSE medical_training;\n\n-- 用户表\nCREATE TABLE users (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    member_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '会员编号',\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',\n    id_number VARCHAR(18) UNIQUE COMMENT '身份证号',\n    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '手机号',\n    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',\n    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码(加密存储)',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',\n    status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'banned') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'super_admin') DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',\n    register_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间',\n    last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    INDEX idx_member_number (member_number),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_role (role)\n) COMMENT='用户表';\n\n-- 会员订阅表\nCREATE TABLE subscriptions (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    plan_type ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly') NOT NULL COMMENT '订阅类型',\n    start_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期',\n    end_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '结束日期',\n    status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否自动续费',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_end_date (end_date)\n) COMMENT='会员订阅表';\n\n-- 支付记录表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "-- 创建数据库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS medical_training CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "USE medical_training;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "-- 用户表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE users ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    member_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '会员编号',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    id_number VARCHAR(18) UNIQUE COMMENT '身份证号',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '手机号',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码(加密存储)',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    avatar VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'banned') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'super_admin') DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    register_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_member_number (member_number),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_status (status),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_role (role)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": ") COMMENT='用户表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "-- 会员订阅表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE subscriptions ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    plan_type ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly') NOT NULL COMMENT '订阅类型',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    start_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    end_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '结束日期',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否自动续费',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_status (status),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_end_date (end_date)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": ") COMMENT='会员订阅表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "-- 支付记录表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "-- 创建数据库\nCREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS medical_training CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\nUSE medical_training;\n\n-- 用户表\nCREATE TABLE users (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    member_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '会员编号',\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',\n    id_number VARCHAR(18) UNIQUE COMMENT '身份证号',\n    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '手机号',\n    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',\n    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码(加密存储)',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',\n    status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'banned') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'super_admin') DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',\n    register_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间',\n    last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    INDEX idx_member_number (member_number),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_role (role)\n) COMMENT='用户表';\n\n-- 会员订阅表\nCREATE TABLE subscriptions (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    plan_type ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly') NOT NULL COMMENT '订阅类型',\n    start_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期',\n    end_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '结束日期',\n    status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否自动续费',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_end_date (end_date)\n) COMMENT='会员订阅表';\n\n-- 支付记录表\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 44
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "file.txt"
      },
      "score": 0.2978515625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Payments;\r\nimport com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentsService;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.service.impl.ServiceImpl;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表 服务实现类\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Service\r\npublic class PaymentsServiceImpl extends ServiceImpl\u003cPaymentsMapper, Payments\u003e implements PaymentsService {\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.service.impl;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Payments;\r\nimport com.example.demo.mapper.PaymentsMapper;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.PaymentsService;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.service.impl.ServiceImpl;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 支付记录表 服务实现类\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Service\r\npublic class PaymentsServiceImpl extends ServiceImpl\u003cPaymentsMapper, Payments\u003e implements PaymentsService {\r\n\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

      "score": 0.29296875
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 尝试更改Content-Type为表单数据\r\n    return api.post('/api/payments/wechat', \r\n      JSON.stringify(paymentData), \r\n      { \r\n        headers: { \r\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8'\r\n        } \r\n      }\r\n    );\r\n  },",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "// 支付相关 API\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "export const paymentApi = {\r"

            "lineNumber": 80,

            "lineNumber": 85,

            "lineNumber": 86,

            "lineNumber": 92,

          },

            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  }) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    // 确保数据格式正确\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    const paymentData = {\r"

            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "      ...data,\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r"

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 尝试更改Content-Type为表单数据\r\n    return api.post('/api/payments/wechat', \r\n      JSON.stringify(paymentData), \r\n      { \r\n        headers: { \r\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8'\r\n        } \r\n      }\r\n    );\r\n  },",

  \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n            \u003c/Card\u003e\n\n            \u003cCard\u003e\n              \u003cCardHeader\u003e\n                \u003cCardTitle\u003e支付方式\u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n _**Agent**_

根据错误日志和我们的调查，问题明确了：

1. `user_id`字段在数据库中被定义为`NOT NULL`约束，且有外键引用到`users`表。
2. 我们的代码现在已经确保了userId不会为null，但是我们使用的默认值`1`可能在`users`表中不存在。

让我们确保使用存在的用户ID作为默认值，为此，我们需要查看`users`表的结构：

_**Agent**_

        "contents": "-- 创建数据库\nCREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS medical_training CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\nUSE medical_training;\n\n-- 用户表\nCREATE TABLE users (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    member_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '会员编号',\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',\n    id_number VARCHAR(18) UNIQUE COMMENT '身份证号',\n    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '手机号',\n    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',\n    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码(加密存储)',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',\n    status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'banned') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'super_admin') DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',\n    register_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间',\n    last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    INDEX idx_member_number (member_number),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_role (role)\n) COMMENT='用户表';\n\n-- 会员订阅表\nCREATE TABLE subscriptions (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    plan_type ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly') NOT NULL COMMENT '订阅类型',\n    start_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期',\n    end_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '结束日期',\n    status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否自动续费',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_end_date (end_date)\n) COMMENT='会员订阅表';\n\n-- 支付记录表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "-- 创建数据库"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS medical_training CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;"

          },
          {

            "text": "CREATE TABLE users ("

            "lineNumber": 8,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    id_number VARCHAR(18) UNIQUE COMMENT '身份证号',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '手机号',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码(加密存储)',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    avatar VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'banned') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'super_admin') DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    register_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,

          },

            "lineNumber": 20,

          },

          },
          {

            "text": "    INDEX idx_status (status),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_role (role)"

          {

            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "-- 会员订阅表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,

            "text": "    auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否自动续费',"

        "originalContents": "-- 创建数据库\nCREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS medical_training CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\nUSE medical_training;\n\n-- 用户表\nCREATE TABLE users (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    member_number VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '会员编号',\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '姓名',\n    id_number VARCHAR(18) UNIQUE COMMENT '身份证号',\n    phone VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE COMMENT '手机号',\n    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE COMMENT '邮箱',\n    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码(加密存储)',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',\n    status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'banned') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'super_admin') DEFAULT 'user' COMMENT '角色',\n    register_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '注册时间',\n    last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    INDEX idx_member_number (member_number),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_role (role)\n) COMMENT='用户表';\n\n-- 会员订阅表\nCREATE TABLE subscriptions (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    plan_type ENUM('monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly') NOT NULL COMMENT '订阅类型',\n    start_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期',\n    end_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '结束日期',\n    status ENUM('active', 'expired', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\n    auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否自动续费',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_end_date (end_date)\n) COMMENT='会员订阅表';\n\n-- 支付记录表\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE ratings (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    score TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '评分(1-5)',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_video (user_id, video_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    CHECK (score BETWEEN 1 AND 5)\n) COMMENT='视频评分表';\n\n-- 证书表\nCREATE TABLE certificates (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '证书标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '证书描述',\n    issue_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '颁发日期',\n    expiry_date DATETIME COMMENT '过期日期',\n    certificate_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '证书URL',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_issue_date (issue_date),\n    INDEX idx_expiry_date (expiry_date)\n) COMMENT='证书表';\n\n-- 系统设置表\nCREATE TABLE settings (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    setting_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '设置键',\n    setting_value TEXT COMMENT '设置值',\n    description VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '描述',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n) COMMENT='系统设置表';\n\n-- 操作日志表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE ratings ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"

            "lineNumber": 203,

          },

            "text": "    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',"

            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "    CHECK (score BETWEEN 1 AND 5)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": ") COMMENT='视频评分表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {

          },
          {

        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE ratings (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    score TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '评分(1-5)',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_video (user_id, video_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    CHECK (score BETWEEN 1 AND 5)\n) COMMENT='视频评分表';\n\n-- 证书表\nCREATE TABLE certificates (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    title VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '证书标题',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '证书描述',\n    issue_date DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '颁发日期',\n    expiry_date DATETIME COMMENT '过期日期',\n    certificate_url VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '证书URL',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_issue_date (issue_date),\n    INDEX idx_expiry_date (expiry_date)\n) COMMENT='证书表';\n\n-- 系统设置表\nCREATE TABLE settings (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    setting_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE COMMENT '设置键',\n    setting_value TEXT COMMENT '设置值',\n    description VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '描述',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n) COMMENT='系统设置表';\n\n-- 操作日志表\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "INSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96; VALUES (5, 6, 'yearly', '2025-02-08 16:38:58', '2025-04-08 16:38:58', 'expired', 0, '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96; VALUES (6, 7, 'monthly', '2025-05-03 16:38:58', '2025-06-02 16:38:58', 'active', 1, '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96; VALUES (7, 8, 'quarterly', '2025-03-08 16:38:58', '2025-06-08 16:38:58', 'active', 1, '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96; VALUES (8, 9, 'yearly', '2025-05-07 16:38:58', '2026-05-07 16:38:58', 'active', 1, '2025-05-08 16:38:58', '2025-05-08 16:38:58');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96; VALUES (9, 10, 'monthly', '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-15 16:39:07', 'active', 0, '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96; VALUES (10, 11, 'monthly', '2025-04-09 16:39:07', '2025-05-09 16:39:07', 'active', 0, '2025-05-08 16:39:07', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for users\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;users&#96;;\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE materials (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    video_id INT COMMENT '关联的视频ID',\n    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '资料名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '资料描述',\n    file_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件URL',\n    file_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '文件类型',\n    file_size INT COMMENT '文件大小(KB)',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)',\n    download_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '下载次数',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type)\n) COMMENT='学习资料表';\n\n-- 视频观看记录表\nCREATE TABLE watch_history (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    progress INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看进度(秒)',\n    completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否完成观看',\n    last_watched DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后观看时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_video (user_id, video_id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_last_watched (last_watched)\n) COMMENT='视频观看记录表';\n\n-- 用户笔记表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE materials ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    video_id INT COMMENT '关联的视频ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '资料名称',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    description TEXT COMMENT '资料描述',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    file_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件URL',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    file_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '文件类型',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    file_size INT COMMENT '文件大小(KB)',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    download_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '下载次数',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": ") COMMENT='学习资料表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "-- 视频观看记录表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE watch_history ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',"

          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "    progress INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看进度(秒)',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否完成观看',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "    last_watched DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后观看时间',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_video (user_id, video_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_last_watched (last_watched)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": ") COMMENT='视频观看记录表';"

            "lineNumber": 166

            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "-- 用户笔记表"

        ],
        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE materials (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    video_id INT COMMENT '关联的视频ID',\n    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '资料名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '资料描述',\n    file_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件URL',\n    file_type VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '文件类型',\n    file_size INT COMMENT '文件大小(KB)',\n    access_type ENUM('external', 'internal') DEFAULT 'external' COMMENT '访问类型(external:公开,internal:仅会员)',\n    download_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '下载次数',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_access_type (access_type)\n) COMMENT='学习资料表';\n\n-- 视频观看记录表\nCREATE TABLE watch_history (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    progress INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看进度(秒)',\n    completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE COMMENT '是否完成观看',\n    last_watched DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后观看时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    UNIQUE KEY uk_user_video (user_id, video_id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_last_watched (last_watched)\n) COMMENT='视频观看记录表';\n\n-- 用户笔记表\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 168
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 132
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "file.txt"
