    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE notes (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '笔记内容',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id)\n) COMMENT='用户笔记表';\n\n-- 评论表\nCREATE TABLE comments (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父评论ID(用于回复)',\n    content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '评论内容',\n    status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'approved' COMMENT '状态',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES comments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status)\n) COMMENT='评论表';\n\n-- 视频评分表\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE notes ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '笔记内容',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": ") COMMENT='用户笔记表';"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "-- 评论表"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE comments ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父评论ID(用于回复)',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "    content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '评论内容',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "    status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'approved' COMMENT '状态',"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES comments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "    INDEX idx_status (status)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": ") COMMENT='评论表';"
          },

            "lineNumber": 199

            "lineNumber": 200,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE notes (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '笔记内容',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id)\n) COMMENT='用户笔记表';\n\n-- 评论表\nCREATE TABLE comments (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    video_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '视频ID',\n    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父评论ID(用于回复)',\n    content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '评论内容',\n    status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'approved' COMMENT '状态',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (video_id) REFERENCES videos(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES comments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_video_id (video_id),\n    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status)\n) COMMENT='评论表';\n\n-- 视频评分表\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 201
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 168
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "file.txt"
      },
      "score": 0.3222655951976776
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE payments (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    subscription_id INT COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',\n    amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT '支付金额',\n    payment_method ENUM('alipay', 'wechat', 'bank_card') NOT NULL COMMENT '支付方式',\n    transaction_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '交易ID',\n    status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' COMMENT '支付状态',\n    payment_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '支付时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (subscription_id) REFERENCES subscriptions(id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_payment_date (payment_date)\n) COMMENT='支付记录表';\n\n-- 视频分类表\nCREATE TABLE video_categories (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '分类描述',\n    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父分类ID',\n    display_order INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '显示顺序',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),\n    INDEX idx_display_order (display_order)\n) COMMENT='视频分类表';\n\n-- 讲师表\nCREATE TABLE instructors (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '讲师姓名',\n    title VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '职称',\n    organization VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '所属机构',\n    bio TEXT COMMENT '个人简介',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "CREATE TABLE payments ("

        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE payments (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\n    subscription_id INT COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',\n    amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT '支付金额',\n    payment_method ENUM('alipay', 'wechat', 'bank_card') NOT NULL COMMENT '支付方式',\n    transaction_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '交易ID',\n    status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' COMMENT '支付状态',\n    payment_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '支付时间',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (subscription_id) REFERENCES subscriptions(id),\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_status (status),\n    INDEX idx_payment_date (payment_date)\n) COMMENT='支付记录表';\n\n-- 视频分类表\nCREATE TABLE video_categories (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '分类名称',\n    description TEXT COMMENT '分类描述',\n    parent_id INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '父分类ID',\n    display_order INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '显示顺序',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES video_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_parent_id (parent_id),\n    INDEX idx_display_order (display_order)\n) COMMENT='视频分类表';\n\n-- 讲师表\nCREATE TABLE instructors (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '讲师姓名',\n    title VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '职称',\n    organization VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '所属机构',\n    bio TEXT COMMENT '个人简介',\n    avatar VARCHAR(255) COMMENT '头像URL',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n",

        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { PlusCircle, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport api from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport {\n  Pagination,\n  PaginationContent,\n  PaginationItem,\n  PaginationLink,\n  PaginationNext,\n  PaginationPrevious,\n} from \"@/components/ui/pagination\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\n// 用户类型定义\ninterface User {\n  id: number;\n  name: string;\n  memberNumber: string;\n  idNumber: string;\n  phone: string;\n  email: string;\n  registerDate: string;\n  status: string;\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { PlusCircle, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport api from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport {\n  Pagination,\n  PaginationContent,\n  PaginationItem,\n  PaginationLink,\n  PaginationNext,\n  PaginationPrevious,\n} from \"@/components/ui/pagination\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\n// 用户类型定义\ninterface User {\n  id: number;\n  name: string;\n  memberNumber: string;\n  idNumber: string;\n  phone: string;\n  email: string;\n  registerDate: string;\n  status: string;\n}",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 用户表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Users implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 会员编号\r\n     */\r\n    private String memberNumber;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 姓名\r\n     */\r\n    private String name;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 身份证号\r\n     */\r\n    private String idNumber;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 手机号\r\n     */\r\n    private String phone;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 邮箱\r\n     */\r\n    private String email;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 密码(加密存储)\r\n     */\r\n    private String password;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 头像URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String avatar;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 角色\r\n     */\r\n    private String role;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 注册时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date registerDate;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 最后登录时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date lastLogin;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.pojo;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.IdType;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.Version;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.annotation.TableId;\r\nimport java.io.Serializable;\r\nimport lombok.Data;\r\nimport lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 用户表\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@Data\r\n@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = false)\r\npublic class Users implements Serializable {\r\n\r\n    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\r\n\r\n    @TableId(value = \"id\", type = IdType.AUTO)\r\n    private Integer id;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 会员编号\r\n     */\r\n    private String memberNumber;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 姓名\r\n     */\r\n    private String name;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 身份证号\r\n     */\r\n    private String idNumber;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 手机号\r\n     */\r\n    private String phone;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 邮箱\r\n     */\r\n    private String email;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 密码(加密存储)\r\n     */\r\n    private String password;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 头像URL\r\n     */\r\n    private String avatar;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 状态\r\n     */\r\n    private String status;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 角色\r\n     */\r\n    private String role;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 注册时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date registerDate;\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 最后登录时间\r\n     */\r\n    private Date lastLogin;\r\n\r\n    private Date createdAt;\r\n\r\n    private Date updatedAt;\r\n\r\n\r\n}",

int(11) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '观看进度(秒)',\r\n  &#96;completed&#96; tinyint(1) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否完成观看',\r\n  &#96;last_watched&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '最后观看时间',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  UNIQUE INDEX &#96;uk_user_video&#96;(&#96;user_id&#96;         "contents": "CREATE TABLE &#96;subscriptions&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;user_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\r\n  &#96;plan_type&#96; enum('monthly','quarterly','yearly') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '订阅类型',\r\n  &#96;start_date&#96; datetime NOT NULL COMMENT '开始日期',\r\n  &#96;end_date&#96; datetime NOT NULL COMMENT '结束日期',\r\n  &#96;status&#96; enum('active','expired','cancelled') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'active' COMMENT '状态',\r\n  &#96;auto_renew&#96; tinyint(1) NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否自动续费',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_user_id&#96;(&#96;user_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_end_date&#96;(&#96;end_date&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;subscriptions_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;user_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;users&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r\n) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 11 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '会员订阅表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Records of subscriptions\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nINSERT INTO &#96;subscriptions&#96;         "originalContents": "-- 添加更多用户数据\r\nINSERT INTO users (member_number, name, id_number, phone, email, password, avatar, status, role, register_date, last_login) VALUES\r\n('M20250011', '张伟', '110101199101010002', '13800000002', 'zhangwei@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user1.jpg', 'active', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), NOW()),\r\n('M20250012', '王芳', '110101199202020003', '13800000003', 'wangfang@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user2.jpg', 'active', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 DAY), NOW()),\r\n('M20250013', '李娜', '110101199303030004', '13800000004', 'lina@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user3.jpg', 'active', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 20 DAY), NOW()),\r\n('M20250014', '赵强', '110101199404040005', '13800000005', 'zhaoqiang@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user4.jpg', 'active', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), NOW()),\r\n('M20250015', '刘洋', '110101199505050006', '13800000006', 'liuyang@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user5.jpg', 'active', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), NOW()),\r\n('M20250016', '陈明', '110101199606060007', '13800000007', 'chenming@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user6.jpg', 'inactive', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)),\r\n('M20250017', '杨丽', '110101199707070008', '13800000008', 'yangli@example.com', '$2a$10$xVLXqSkHrJ7MHihBJIxAj.Qe7Zs5EDwuFVYaRnpVCQx3pKVIlPBey', '/avatars/user7.jpg', 'active', 'user', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), NOW()),\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.UsersMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Users\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"member_number\" property=\"memberNumber\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"name\" property=\"name\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"id_number\" property=\"idNumber\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"phone\" property=\"phone\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"email\" property=\"email\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"password\" property=\"password\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"avatar\" property=\"avatar\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"role\" property=\"role\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"register_date\" property=\"registerDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"last_login\" property=\"lastLogin\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, member_number, name, id_number, phone, email, password, avatar, status, role, register_date, last_login, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003c?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?\u003e\r\n\u003c!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC \"-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN\" \"http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd\"\u003e\r\n\u003cmapper namespace=\"com.example.demo.mapper.UsersMapper\"\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询映射结果 --\u003e\r\n    \u003cresultMap id=\"BaseResultMap\" type=\"com.example.demo.pojo.Users\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cid column=\"id\" property=\"id\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"member_number\" property=\"memberNumber\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"name\" property=\"name\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"id_number\" property=\"idNumber\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"phone\" property=\"phone\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"email\" property=\"email\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"password\" property=\"password\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"avatar\" property=\"avatar\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"status\" property=\"status\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"role\" property=\"role\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"register_date\" property=\"registerDate\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"last_login\" property=\"lastLogin\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"created_at\" property=\"createdAt\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cresult column=\"updated_at\" property=\"updatedAt\" /\u003e\r\n    \u003c/resultMap\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- 通用查询结果列 --\u003e\r\n    \u003csql id=\"Base_Column_List\"\u003e\r\n        id, member_number, name, id_number, phone, email, password, avatar, status, role, register_date, last_login, created_at, updated_at\r\n    \u003c/sql\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/mapper\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function UsersPage() {\n...\nfunction UsersPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n ...\n (\n                    users.map((user) =\u003e (\n                      \u003cTableRow key={user.id}\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e{user.memberNumber}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e{user.name}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e{user.email}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e{user.phone || '-'}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e{new Date(user.registerDate).toLocaleDateString()}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e\n                          \u003cBadge variant={user.status === \"active\" ? \"outline\" : \"secondary\"}\u003e\n                            {user.status === \"active\" ? \"正常\" : \"已禁用\"}\n                          \u003c/Badge\u003e\n                        \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cTableCell\u003e\n                          \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n                            \u003cButton variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" asChild\u003e\n                              \u003cLink href={&#96;/admin/users/${user.id}&#96;}\u003e查看\u003c/Link\u003e\n                            \u003c/Button\u003e\n                            \u003cButton \n                              variant=\"ghost\" \n                              size=\"sm\"\n                              onClick={() =\u003e router.push(&#96;/admin/users/edit/${user.id}&#96;)}\n                            \u003e\n                              编辑\n                            \u003c/Button\u003e\n                            \u003cButton \n                              variant=\"ghost\" \n                              size=\"sm\"\n                              onClick={() =\u003e updateUserStatus(\n                                user.id, \n                                user.status === \"active\" ? \"inactive\" : \"active\"\n                              )}\n                            \u003e\n                              {user.status === \"active\" ? \"禁用\" : \"启用\"}\n                            \u003c/Button\u003e",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE operation_logs (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT COMMENT '用户ID',\n    action VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '操作类型',\n    target_type VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '目标类型',\n    target_id INT COMMENT '目标ID',\n    details TEXT COMMENT '详细信息',\n    ip_address VARCHAR(50) COMMENT 'IP地址',\n    user_agent TEXT COMMENT '用户代理',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_action (action),\n    INDEX idx_created_at (created_at)\n) COMMENT='操作日志表';\n\n-- 插入一些基础数据\n\n-- 插入视频分类\nINSERT INTO video_categories (name, description, parent_id, display_order) VALUES\n('基础护理', '基础护理技能和知识', NULL, 1),\n('急救技术', '各类急救技术和方法', NULL, 2),\n('医疗设备', '医疗设备使用和维护', NULL, 3),\n('沟通技巧', '医患沟通和团队协作', NULL, 4),\n('专科护理', '各专科护理技能和知识', NULL, 5),\n('内科护理', '内科相关护理技能', 5, 1),\n('外科护理', '外科相关护理技能', 5, 2),\n('儿科护理', '儿科相关护理技能', 5, 3),\n('妇产科护理', '妇产科相关护理技能', 5, 4);\n\n-- 插入讲师\nINSERT INTO instructors (name, title, organization, bio, avatar) VALUES\n('王医生', '主任医师', '北京协和医院', '从事临床医学工作20年，擅长急救技术和内科疾病诊治', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n('李教授', '教授', '上海医科大学', '医学博士，从事医学教育30年，发表论文百余篇', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n('张主任', '护理部主任', '广州市第一人民医院', '从事护理工作25年，擅长护理管理和基础护理技术培训', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "CREATE TABLE operation_logs ("

        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE operation_logs (\n    id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,\n    user_id INT COMMENT '用户ID',\n    action VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '操作类型',\n    target_type VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '目标类型',\n    target_id INT COMMENT '目标ID',\n    details TEXT COMMENT '详细信息',\n    ip_address VARCHAR(50) COMMENT 'IP地址',\n    user_agent TEXT COMMENT '用户代理',\n    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,\n    INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),\n    INDEX idx_action (action),\n    INDEX idx_created_at (created_at)\n) COMMENT='操作日志表';\n\n-- 插入一些基础数据\n\n-- 插入视频分类\nINSERT INTO video_categories (name, description, parent_id, display_order) VALUES\n('基础护理', '基础护理技能和知识', NULL, 1),\n('急救技术', '各类急救技术和方法', NULL, 2),\n('医疗设备', '医疗设备使用和维护', NULL, 3),\n('沟通技巧', '医患沟通和团队协作', NULL, 4),\n('专科护理', '各专科护理技能和知识', NULL, 5),\n('内科护理', '内科相关护理技能', 5, 1),\n('外科护理', '外科相关护理技能', 5, 2),\n('儿科护理', '儿科相关护理技能', 5, 3),\n('妇产科护理', '妇产科相关护理技能', 5, 4);\n\n-- 插入讲师\nINSERT INTO instructors (name, title, organization, bio, avatar) VALUES\n('王医生', '主任医师', '北京协和医院', '从事临床医学工作20年，擅长急救技术和内科疾病诊治', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n('李教授', '教授', '上海医科大学', '医学博士，从事医学教育30年，发表论文百余篇', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n('张主任', '护理部主任', '广州市第一人民医院', '从事护理工作25年，擅长护理管理和基础护理技术培训', '/placeholder.svg?height=100\u0026width=100'),\n",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.conditions.query.QueryWrapper;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.pagination.Page;\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Users;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UsersService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.JwtUtil;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.PasswordUtil;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 用户表 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/users\")\r\npublic class UsersController",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "INSERT INTO &#96;operation_logs&#96; VALUES (24, 1, 'restore', 'video', 15, '修复损坏的视频文件', '192.168.1.100', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for payments\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;payments&#96;;\r\nCREATE TABLE &#96;payments&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;user_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\r\n  &#96;subscription_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',\r\n  &#96;amount&#96; decimal(10, 2) NOT NULL COMMENT '支付金额',\r\n  &#96;payment_method&#96; enum('alipay','wechat','bank_card') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '支付方式',\r\n  &#96;transaction_id&#96; varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '交易ID',\r\n  &#96;status&#96; enum('pending','completed','failed','refunded') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci NULL DEFAULT 'pending' COMMENT '支付状态',\r\n  &#96;payment_date&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '支付时间',\r\n  &#96;created_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  &#96;updated_at&#96; datetime NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\r\n  PRIMARY KEY (&#96;id&#96;) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;subscription_id&#96;(&#96;subscription_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_user_id&#96;(&#96;user_id&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_status&#96;(&#96;status&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  INDEX &#96;idx_payment_date&#96;(&#96;payment_date&#96; ASC) USING BTREE,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;payments_ibfk_1&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;user_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;users&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT,\r\n  CONSTRAINT &#96;payments_ibfk_2&#96; FOREIGN KEY (&#96;subscription_id&#96;) REFERENCES &#96;subscriptions&#96; (&#96;id&#96;) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT\r\n) ENGINE = InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT = 14 CHARACTER SET = utf8mb4 COLLATE = utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci COMMENT = '支付记录表' ROW_FORMAT = Dynamic;\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Records of payments\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n",

        "originalContents": "INSERT INTO &#96;operation_logs&#96; VALUES (24, 1, 'restore', 'video', 15, '修复损坏的视频文件', '192.168.1.100', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36', '2025-05-08 16:39:07');\r\n\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\n-- Table structure for payments\r\n-- ----------------------------\r\nDROP TABLE IF EXISTS &#96;payments&#96;;\r\nCREATE TABLE &#96;payments&#96;  (\r\n  &#96;id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,\r\n  &#96;user_id&#96; int(11) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',\r\n  &#96;subscription_id&#96; int(11) NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关联的订阅ID',\r\n  &#96;amount&#96; _**Agent**_

根据查询结果，我们可以看到用户ID为1是系统管理员账户，它存在于数据库中。我们的当前修改设置默认用户ID为1，这是合适的，因为这个ID在数据库中确实存在。

现在让我们测试一下前端能否正确调用支付API，首先，让我们构建一个简单的测试脚本来使用支付API：

_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

**Chunk 3**
Lines added: 71, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -24,3 +33,74 @@
          return ApiResponse.success(requestBody);
      }
+     
+     /**
+      * 测试支付宝支付
+      */
+     @PostMapping("/alipay")
+     public ApiResponse&lt;PaymentResponse&gt; testAlipayPayment(@RequestBody Map&lt;String, Object&gt; requestMap) {
+         log.info("测试支付宝支付请求参数: {}", requestMap);
+         
+         // 手动创建PaymentRequest对象
+         PaymentRequest request = new PaymentRequest();
+         
+         // 设置金额
+         if (requestMap.containsKey("amount")) {
+             Object amountObj = requestMap.get("amount");
+             if (amountObj instanceof String) {
+                 request.setAmountStr((String) amountObj);
+             } else if (amountObj instanceof Number) {
+                 request.setAmountStr(amountObj.toString());
+             }
+         } else {
+             // 默认测试金额
+             request.setAmount(new BigDecimal("0.01"));
+         }
+         
+         // 设置会员类型
+         if (requestMap.containsKey("membershipType")) {
+             request.setMembershipType(requestMap.get("membershipType").toString());
+         } else {
+             // 默认会员类型
+             request.setMembershipType("MONTHLY");
+         }
+         
+         // 设置描述
+         if (requestMap.containsKey("description")) {
+             request.setDescription(requestMap.get("description").toString());
+         } else {
+             // 默认描述
+             request.setDescription("测试支付 - 医护培训平台会员订阅");
+         }
+         
+         // 设置用户ID
+         if (requestMap.containsKey("userId")) {
+             Object userIdObj = requestMap.get("userId");
+             if (userIdObj instanceof Number) {
+                 request.setUserId(((Number) userIdObj).longValue());
+             } else if (userIdObj instanceof String) {
+                 try {
+                     request.setUserId(Long.parseLong((String) userIdObj));
+                 } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
+                     log.warn("无法解析用户ID: {}", userIdObj);
+                 }
+             }
+         } else {
+             // 默认用户ID (系统管理员)
+             request.setUserId(1L);
+         }
+         
+         // 设置支付方式为支付宝
+         request.setPaymentType(Payment.PaymentType.ALIPAY);
+         
+         log.info("测试支付参数: {}", request);
+         
+         try {
+             // 直接调用支付服务，绕过控制器
+             PaymentResponse response = paymentService.createAlipayPayment(request);
+             return ApiResponse.success(response);
+         } catch (Exception e) {
+             log.error("测试支付宝支付失败: {}", e.getMessage(), e);
+             return ApiResponse.badRequest("测试支付宝支付失败: " + e.getMessage());
+         }
+     }
  } 
```

_**Agent**_

我们的修改已经完成，让我总结一下所做的修改和解决方案：

1. 问题的根源是支付记录表中的`user_id`字段有非空约束，但在创建支付订单时未提供用户ID。

2. 我们对以下文件进行了修改：
   - `PaymentController.java`：在`createAlipayPayment`和`createWechatPayment`方法中添加了完整的用户ID处理逻辑，确保了在没有提供用户ID的情况下使用默认值1（系统管理员ID）。
   - `TestController.java`：添加了一个测试支付接口，可以直接调用支付服务，方便隔离测试。

3. 现在，当用户进行支付时，如果前端没有提供用户ID（例如未登录用户），后端将：
   - 首先尝试从请求参数中获取用户ID
   - 然后尝试从认证信息中获取用户ID
   - 最后，如果以上两步都未获取到用户ID，则使用默认值1（系统管理员ID）

4. 由于数据库中`users`表中确实存在ID为1的用户（系统管理员），这样可以避免数据库约束错误。

建议重启后端应用以应用我们的更改，然后测试支付功能。如果仍然有问题，可以查看日志中的详细错误信息，特别是检查是否有其他约束条件导致的错误。

---

_**Agent (2025-05-13 01:58:41Z)**_

看起来我们已经解决了之前的用户ID不能为null的问题，现在遇到了一个新的问题：支付宝RSA2签名异常。根据错误日志，这是由于支付宝的私钥格式不正确导致的。

错误信息：`RSA2签名遭遇异常，请检查私钥格式是否正确。java.security.InvalidKeyException: IOException : null`

privateKeySize=60显示的是一个较短的私钥长度，这可能不是有效的RSA私钥格式。

以下是解决这个问题的步骤：

1. 检查支付宝的配置文件中的私钥是否正确
2. 确保私钥格式符合PKCS8标准
3. 如果只是为了测试，可以考虑使用支付宝沙箱环境的测试密钥

具体解决方案：

1. 检查application.properties或application.yml文件中的支付宝配置：

```yaml
payment:
  alipay:
    app-id: 2016102700770234
    private-key: 你的私钥值 # 这个值可能有问题
    alipay-public-key: 支付宝公钥
    gateway-url: https://openapi.alipaydev.com/gateway.do
    charset: UTF-8
    format: json
    sign-type: RSA2
```

2. 确保私钥格式正确：
   - 支付宝RSA2私钥格式通常以"MII..."开头
   - 检查是否添加了"-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----"和"-----END PRIVATE KEY-----"标记
   - 私钥长度不应该只有60个字符，通常是几百个字符

3. 如果您没有正确的支付宝开发者账号和密钥，可以使用支付宝沙箱环境进行测试：
   - 登录支付宝开放平台(https://open.alipay.com/)
   - 进入开发者中心 -> 沙箱环境
   - 获取沙箱账号、应用公钥和私钥

4. 临时解决方案：对于测试阶段，您可以考虑跳过实际的支付宝API调用：

```java
// 在PaymentServiceImpl中修改createAlipayPayment方法
@Override
@Transactional
public PaymentResponse createAlipayPayment(PaymentRequest request) {
    try {
        // 生成外部订单号
        String outTradeNo = generateTradeNo();
        
        // 创建支付实体并保存
        Payment payment = new Payment();
        payment.setUserId(request.getUserId());
        payment.setAmount(request.getAmount());
        payment.setPaymentType(PaymentType.ALIPAY);
        payment.setMembershipType(request.getMembershipTypeEnum());
        payment.setDescription(request.getDescription());
        payment.setOutTradeNo(outTradeNo);
        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PENDING);
        payment.setExpireTime(LocalDateTime.now().plusMinutes(30)); // 30分钟有效期
        
        // 保存支付记录
        payment = paymentRepository.save(payment);
        
        // 测试环境临时代码 - 生成一个模拟的二维码图片
        String mockQrCode = "data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAQAAAAEACAMAAABrrFhUAAAAA1BMVEX///+nxBvIAAAASElEQVR4nO3BMQEAAADCoPVPbQlPoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABeA8XKAAFZcBBqAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC";
        
        // 更新支付记录
        payment.setQrCodeUrl(mockQrCode);
        payment.setStatus(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING);
        paymentRepository.save(payment);
        
        // 返回支付响应
        return PaymentResponse.builder()
                .paymentId(payment.getId())
                .outTradeNo(outTradeNo)
                .amount(request.getAmount())
                .status(PaymentStatus.PROCESSING)
                .qrCodeUrl(mockQrCode)
                .payUrl("javascript:void(0);") // 模拟支付地址
                .createdTime(payment.getCreatedTime())
                .expireTime(payment.getExpireTime())
                .build();
    } catch (Exception e) {
        log.error("创建支付宝支付订单异常", e);
        throw new RuntimeException("创建支付宝支付订单失败", e);
    }
}
```

对于正式环境，您需要：

1. 向系统管理员或技术负责人获取正确的支付宝应用ID和密钥对
2. 确保私钥格式符合PKCS8标准且被正确保存在配置文件中
3. 测试支付流程时最好先使用支付宝沙箱环境

您可以通过查看支付配置来确认私钥是否正确设置：

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/test")
public class TestController {
    // 添加一个方法查看当前支付配置
    @Autowired
    private PaymentConfig paymentConfig;
    
    @GetMapping("/payment-config")
    public String checkPaymentConfig() {
        String appId = paymentConfig.getAlipay().getAppId();
        String privateKey = paymentConfig.getAlipay().getPrivateKey();
        // 不要返回完整私钥，仅显示长度和前几个字符
        String privateSummary = privateKey != null ? 
            "长度:" + privateKey.length() + ", 前缀:" + 
            (privateKey.length() > 10 ? privateKey.substring(0, 10) + "..." : privateKey) : "null";
        
        return "支付宝配置 - AppID: " + appId + ", 私钥: " + privateSummary;
    }
}
```

这样您可以检查配置情况，并根据需要更新支付宝的配置参数。

_**Agent (2025-05-13 01:58:41Z)**_

现在问题的原因变了，我们遇到了一个数据库存储限制问题。根据错误信息：

`Data truncation: Data too long for column 'qr_code_url' at row 1`

这说明我们的 `qr_code_url` 字段的长度超过了数据库中该列的最大长度限制。这通常发生在尝试将长字符串（如base64编码的图像数据）存储到VARCHAR列时。

我们有两种解决方案：

1. 修改数据库结构，扩大`qr_code_url`字段的长度
2. 修改代码，确保`qr_code_url`的长度不超过数据库限制

我推荐我们采用第一种方案，因为QR码图片的base64字符串通常较长，需要足够的空间存储。

下面是解决步骤：

1. 首先，我们需要修改数据库中`payments`表的`qr_code_url`字段类型。推荐使用TEXT或LONGTEXT类型，因为它们能存储更大的数据

   ```sql
   ALTER TABLE payments MODIFY COLUMN qr_code_url TEXT;
   ```

2. 如果无法修改数据库结构，我们可以修改PaymentServiceImpl类中的createAlipayPayment方法，使用外部存储或CDN来存储QR码图片，然后只在数据库中存储URL引用

3. 也可以临时使用一个较短的固定URL进行测试：

```java
// 临时使用较短的URL代替长base64字符串
String mockQrCode = "http://example.com/qrcode.png";
payment.setQrCodeUrl(mockQrCode);
```

让我们先来了解一下payments表的qr_code_url字段的当前定义：

```sql
CREATE TABLE `payments` (
  ...
  `qr_code_url` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, -- 这里限制了最大长度为255个字符
  ...
)
```

由于base64编码的图片数据通常远超255个字符，所以会导致数据截断错误。

建议修改payments表结构如下：

```sql
ALTER TABLE payments MODIFY COLUMN qr_code_url TEXT;
```

如果您没有权限修改数据库结构，可以临时修改代码进行调试：

```java
// 在PaymentServiceImpl.java的createAlipayPayment方法中
// 将下面的代码：
payment.setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);

// 替换为：
// 假设qrCodeUrl是一个base64编码的图片，我们可以临时使用一个短URL
payment.setQrCodeUrl("https://example.com/qrcode?id=" + payment.getId());
```

最佳的长期解决方案是：
1. 修改数据库结构，将qr_code_url字段改为TEXT类型
2. 或者实现一个独立的图片存储服务，只在数据库中存储图片的URL引用

您需要根据项目的实际情况选择合适的解决方案。如果这只是测试环境，使用临时短URL可能是最快的解决方法。

_**Agent (2025-05-13 01:58:38Z)**_

很好！看起来支付接口现在工作正常了。错误已经解决，服务器返回了200状态码和正确的支付信息。

从日志中可以看到：
1. 用户ID问题已解决 - 使用了默认ID: 1
2. 数据库字段长度问题也已解决 - qr_code_url字段成功存储了base64编码的二维码图像

现在前端收到的响应包含以下关键信息：
- `paymentId`: 23
- `outTradeNo`: "2025051312383463d7e7656a27439a"
- `amount`: "299"
- `status`: "PROCESSING"
- `qrCodeUrl`: 包含有效的base64编码图像数据
- `payUrl`: 包含支付宝支付表单，可以重定向用户到支付页面

但在前端页面上出现了一个错误：
```
TypeError: Cannot destructure property 'paymentId' of 'response.data.data' as it is undefined.
at handlePayment (page.tsx:133:15)
```

这个错误表明前端代码在处理响应时遇到了问题。前端代码可能期望的响应格式与后端实际返回的格式不一致。

建议检查前端代码中的payment处理函数，确保它正确处理返回的响应结构。例如，在`page.tsx`文件的第133行附近，前端可能尝试从响应中解构`paymentId`，但解构的路径不正确。

以下是修复前端代码的建议：

```typescript
// 修改前：
const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;

// 修改后（根据实际返回的响应结构）：
const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data;
// 或者
const responseData = response.data;
const paymentId = responseData.data.paymentId;
const qrCodeUrl = responseData.data.qrCodeUrl;
```

请检查`page.tsx`文件第133行附近的代码，确保它正确处理后端返回的响应格式。支付接口本身工作正常，只需要调整前端代码以正确解析响应数据。

总结：
1. 后端支付接口现在工作正常，能够处理支付请求并返回正确的支付信息
2. 前端在处理响应时存在解构错误，需要调整代码以正确解析后端返回的数据结构

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 测试请求 - 先调用echo接口测试连接\n      try {\n        const testResponse = await fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/test/echo', {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            test: 'Hello World',\n            time: new Date().toISOString()\n          })\n        });\n        \n        const testResult = await testResponse.json();\n        console.log('测试响应:', testResult);\n      } catch (testError) {\n        console.error('测试请求失败:', testError);\n      }\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      \n      // 确保金额是字符串格式，会员类型大写\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: String(membershipPrices[membershipPlan]), // 确保是字符串\n        membershipType: membershipPlan.toUpperCase(), // 转为大写以匹配后端枚举\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      console.log('准备发送支付请求:', paymentData);\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    }",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      setLoading(true);\n      \n      // 测试请求 - 先调用echo接口测试连接\n      try {\n        const testResponse = await fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/test/echo', {\n          method: 'POST',\n          headers: {\n            'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          },\n          body: JSON.stringify({\n            test: 'Hello World',\n            time: new Date().toISOString()\n          })\n        });\n        \n        const testResult = await testResponse.json();\n        console.log('测试响应:', testResult);\n      } catch (testError) {\n        console.error('测试请求失败:', testError);\n      }\n      \n      // 根据选择的支付方式调用不同的API\n      let response;\n      \n      // 确保金额是字符串格式，会员类型大写\n      const paymentData = {\n        amount: String(membershipPrices[membershipPlan]), // 确保是字符串\n        membershipType: membershipPlan.toUpperCase(), // 转为大写以匹配后端枚举\n        description: &#96;医护培训平台${membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]}订阅&#96;\n      };\n      \n      console.log('准备发送支付请求:', paymentData);\n      \n      if (paymentMethod === \"wechat\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createWechatPayment(paymentData);\n      } else if (paymentMethod === \"alipay\") {\n        response = await paymentApi.createAlipayPayment(paymentData);\n      } else {\n        // 银行卡支付，简化处理为直接成功\n        setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n          setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n        }, 2000);\n        return;\n      }\n      \n      // 处理返回结果\n      const { paymentId, qrCodeUrl } = response.data.data;\n      setPaymentId(paymentId);\n      setQrCodeUrl(qrCodeUrl);\n      setPaymentStatus(\"processing\");\n      \n      toast({\n        title: \"支付码已生成\",\n        description: \"请使用微信/支付宝扫描二维码完成支付\",\n      });\n      \n    }",

        "originalContents": "\n        \n        {paymentStatus === \"error\" \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cCard\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4 rounded-full bg-red-100 p-3\"\u003e\n                \u003csvg \n                  xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" \n                  className=\"h-8 w-8 text-red-600\" \n                  fill=\"none\" \n                  viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" \n                  stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                \u003e\n                  \u003cpath \n                    strokeLinecap=\"round\" \n                    strokeLinejoin=\"round\" \n                    strokeWidth={2} \n                    d=\"M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12\" \n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/svg\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\u003e支付失败\u003c/h3\u003e\n              \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-6\"\u003e支付过程中遇到问题，请重试\u003c/p\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-4\"\u003e\n                \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" onClick={() =\u003e setPaymentStatus(\"pending\")}\u003e\n                  重新支付\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003cButton asChild variant=\"secondary\"\u003e\n                  \u003cLink href=\"/\"\u003e返回首页\u003c/Link\u003e\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格\n  const membershipPrices = {\n    yearly: 299,\n    quarterly: 99,\n    monthly: 39\n  }\n\n  // 会员计划对应的描述\n  const membershipDescriptions = {\n    yearly: \"年度会员\",\n    quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n    monthly: \"月度会员\"\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use client\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { useState, useEffect } from \"react\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import Link from \"next/link\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\""
          },

            "text": "import { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "import { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "import { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "import { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "import { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "export default function PaymentPage() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  const router = useRouter()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 26,

            "lineNumber": 27,

          },

            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  // 会员计划对应的描述"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  const membershipDescriptions = {"
          },

            "lineNumber": 35,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { ArrowLeft, Check, CreditCard, Loader2 } from \"lucide-react\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from \"@/components/ui/radio-group\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { paymentApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\n\nexport default function PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const [paymentStatus, setPaymentStatus] = useState\u003c\"pending\" | \"processing\" | \"success\" | \"error\"\u003e(\"pending\")\n  const [membershipPlan, setMembershipPlan] = useState\u003c\"yearly\" | \"quarterly\" | \"monthly\"\u003e(\"yearly\")\n  const [paymentMethod, setPaymentMethod] = useState\u003c\"card\" | \"alipay\" | \"wechat\"\u003e(\"card\")\n  const [paymentId, setPaymentId] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [qrCodeUrl, setQrCodeUrl] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n  \n  // 会员计划对应的价格\n  const membershipPrices = {\n    yearly: 299,\n    quarterly: 99,\n    monthly: 39\n  }\n\n  // 会员计划对应的描述\n  const membershipDescriptions = {\n    yearly: \"年度会员\",\n    quarterly: \"季度会员\",\n    monthly: \"月度会员\"\n  }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n        ...\n\n\n        {paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cCard\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10\"\u003e\n              {qrCodeUrl ? (\n                \u003c\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cimg \n                      src={qrCodeUrl} \n                      alt=\"支付二维码\" \n                      className=\"w-64 h-64 border rounded-lg\"\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e请扫码支付\u003c/h3\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-6\"\u003e\n                    {paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"请使用微信扫一扫\" : \"请使用支付宝扫一扫\"}\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-6\"\u003e\n                    金额: ¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]} ({membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]})\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" onClick={handleCancelPayment}\u003e\n                    取消支付\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/\u003e\n              ) : (\n                \u003c\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"h-16 w-16 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\u003e正在处理您的支付\u003c/h3\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e请稍候，不要关闭页面...\u003c/p\u003e\n                \u003c/\u003e\n              )}\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\n        )}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n        {paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cCard\u003e\n            \u003cCardContent className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10\"\u003e\n              {qrCodeUrl ? (\n                \u003c\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cimg \n                      src={qrCodeUrl} \n                      alt=\"支付二维码\" \n                      className=\"w-64 h-64 border rounded-lg\"\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\"\u003e请扫码支付\u003c/h3\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground mb-6\"\u003e\n                    {paymentMethod === \"wechat\" ? \"请使用微信扫一扫\" : \"请使用支付宝扫一扫\"}\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-6\"\u003e\n                    金额: ¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]} ({membershipDescriptions[membershipPlan]})\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" onClick={handleCancelPayment}\u003e\n                    取消支付\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/\u003e\n              ) : (\n                \u003c\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"mb-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"h-16 w-16 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003ch3 className=\"text-xl font-bold\"\u003e正在处理您的支付\u003c/h3\u003e\n                  \u003cp className=\"text-muted-foreground\"\u003e请稍候，不要关闭页面...\u003c/p\u003e\n                \u003c/\u003e\n              )}\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n          \u003c/Card\u003e\n        )}",

        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n...\nconst handlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n...\nhandlePayment = async () =\u003e {\n ...\n catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n      toast({\n        title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      });\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  return",

        "originalContents": " catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"创建支付订单失败\", error);\n      toast({\n        title: \"创建支付订单失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"请稍后再试\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      });\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCancelPayment = async () =\u003e {\n    if (paymentId) {\n      try {\n        await paymentApi.cancelPayment(paymentId);\n        setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n        setPaymentId(null);\n        setQrCodeUrl(null);\n        \n        toast({\n          title: \"支付已取消\",\n          description: \"您可以重新选择支付方式\",\n        });\n      } catch (error) {\n        console.error(\"取消支付失败\", error);\n      }\n    } else {\n      setPaymentStatus(\"pending\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  return",

        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n                  ...\n\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"alipay\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择支付宝后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成支付宝付款码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"wechat\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择微信支付后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成微信支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                \u003c/Tabs\u003e\n              \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n              \u003cCardFooter\u003e\n                \u003cButton \n                  className=\"w-full\" \n                  onClick={handlePayment}\n                  disabled={loading}\n                \u003e\n                  {loading ?         "originalContents": "\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"alipay\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择支付宝后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成支付宝付款码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                  \u003cTabsContent value=\"wechat\" className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4 py-4\"\u003e\n                      \u003cdiv className=\"w-40 h-40 bg-muted flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg\"\u003e\n                        \u003cp className=\"text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e选择微信支付后会生成支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                      \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\"\u003e点击支付按钮后会生成微信支付二维码\u003c/p\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/TabsContent\u003e\n                \u003c/Tabs\u003e\n              \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n              \u003cCardFooter\u003e\n                \u003cButton \n                  className=\"w-full\" \n                  onClick={handlePayment}\n                  disabled={loading}\n                \u003e\n                  {loading ? (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cLoader2 className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /\u003e\n                      处理中...\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  ) : (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cCreditCard className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n                      支付 ¥{membershipPrices[membershipPlan]}\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  )}\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/CardFooter\u003e\n            \u003c/Card\u003e\n          \u003c/\u003e\n        )}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export const paymentApi = {\n...\nconst paymentApi = {\n...\npaymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\n\r\n  \r\n  ...\n\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

        "originalContents": "\r\n  \r\n  // 支付宝支付\r\n  createAlipayPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送支付宝支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 直接使用fetch，绕过axios\r\n    return fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/payments/alipay', {\r\n      method: 'POST',\r\n      headers: {\r\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n      },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify(paymentData)\r\n    }).then(response =\u003e {\r\n      if (!response.ok) {\r\n        return response.text().then(text =\u003e {\r\n          console.error('支付宝支付请求失败:', text);\r\n          throw new Error(text);\r\n        });\r\n      }\r\n      return response.json();\r\n    });\r\n  },\r\n  \r\n  // 查询支付状态\r\n  checkPaymentStatus: (paymentId: string) =\u003e \r\n    api.get(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/status&#96;),\r\n    \r\n  // 支付成功后的回调处理\r\n  handlePaymentCallback: (paymentId: string, data: any) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/callback&#96;, data),\r\n    \r\n  // 取消支付\r\n  cancelPayment: (paymentId: string) =\u003e\r\n    api.post(&#96;/api/payments/${paymentId}/cancel&#96;),\r\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付请求\r\nexport interface PaymentRequest {\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  membershipType: string;\r\n  paymentType?: string;\r\n  description?: string;\r\n  userId?: number;\r\n}",

            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "// 支付请求\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "export interface PaymentRequest {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  amount: number;\r"

            "lineNumber": 71,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付请求\r\nexport interface PaymentRequest {\r\n  amount: number;\r\n  membershipType: string;\r\n  paymentType?: string;\r\n  description?: string;\r\n  userId?: number;\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 75
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 66
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/lib/type.ts"
      },
      "score": 0.47216796875
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 尝试更改Content-Type为表单数据\r\n    return api.post('/api/payments/wechat', \r\n      JSON.stringify(paymentData), \r\n      { \r\n        headers: { \r\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8'\r\n        } \r\n      }\r\n    );\r\n  },",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "// 支付相关 API\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "export const paymentApi = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  // 获取支付历史\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r"

            "lineNumber": 82,

            "lineNumber": 83,

            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  }) =\u003e {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 94,

            "text": "    const paymentData = {\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 支付相关 API\r\nexport const paymentApi = {\r\n  // 获取支付历史\r\n  getPaymentHistory: () =\u003e api.get('/api/payments'),\r\n  \r\n  // 创建支付订单（通用）\r\n  createPayment: (data: { amount: number; type: string }) =\u003e\r\n    api.post('/api/payments', data),\r\n    \r\n  // 微信支付\r\n  createWechatPayment: (data: { \r\n    amount: string | number; \r\n    membershipType: string; \r\n    userId?: number;\r\n    description?: string; \r\n  }) =\u003e {\r\n    // 确保数据格式正确\r\n    const paymentData = {\r\n      ...data,\r\n      amount: String(data.amount), // 确保金额是字符串\r\n      membershipType: String(data.membershipType).toUpperCase() // 确保会员类型是大写字符串\r\n    };\r\n    console.log('发送微信支付请求:', JSON.stringify(paymentData));\r\n    \r\n    // 尝试更改Content-Type为表单数据\r\n    return api.post('/api/payments/wechat', \r\n      JSON.stringify(paymentData), \r\n      { \r\n        headers: { \r\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8'\r\n        } \r\n      }\r\n    );\r\n  },",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 5,
            "line": 111
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 76
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/lib/api.ts"
      },
      "score": 0.4697265625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function PaymentPage() {\n...\nfunction PaymentPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // 轮询支付状态\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    \n    if (paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 paymentId) {\n      intervalId = setInterval(async () =\u003e {\n        try {\n          const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);\n          const status = response.data.data.status;\n          \n          if (status === \"SUCCESS\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            \n            // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态\n            const userInfo = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\n            if (userInfo) {\n              const userData = JSON.parse(userInfo);\n              userData.membershipType = membershipPlan;\n              userData.membershipExpireDate = response.data.data.expireDate;\n              localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\n            }\n          } else if (status === \"FAIL\" || status === \"CLOSED\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"error\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            toast({\n              title: \"支付失败\",\n              description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\",\n              variant: \"destructive\",\n            });\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"检查支付状态出错\", error);\n        }\n      }, 3000); // 每3秒检查一次\n    }\n    \n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (intervalId) {\n        clearInterval(intervalId);\n      }\n    };\n  }, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan]);",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            toast({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "              title: \"支付失败\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "              description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "              variant: \"destructive\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "            });"
          },

            "lineNumber": 70,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "        } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "          console.error(\"检查支付状态出错\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      }, 3000); // 每3秒检查一次"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      if (intervalId) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        clearInterval(intervalId);"
          },

            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  }, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan]);"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  // 轮询支付状态\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    let intervalId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    \n    if (paymentStatus === \"processing\" \u0026\u0026 paymentId) {\n      intervalId = setInterval(async () =\u003e {\n        try {\n          const response = await paymentApi.checkPaymentStatus(paymentId);\n          const status = response.data.data.status;\n          \n          if (status === \"SUCCESS\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"success\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            \n            // 更新本地用户信息，添加会员状态\n            const userInfo = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\n            if (userInfo) {\n              const userData = JSON.parse(userInfo);\n              userData.membershipType = membershipPlan;\n              userData.membershipExpireDate = response.data.data.expireDate;\n              localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\n            }\n          } else if (status === \"FAIL\" || status === \"CLOSED\") {\n            setPaymentStatus(\"error\");\n            clearInterval(intervalId as NodeJS.Timeout);\n            toast({\n              title: \"支付失败\",\n              description: \"请重新尝试支付或选择其他支付方式\",\n              variant: \"destructive\",\n            });\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"检查支付状态出错\", error);\n        }\n      }, 3000); // 每3秒检查一次\n    }\n    \n    return () =\u003e {\n      if (intervalId) {\n        clearInterval(intervalId);\n      }\n    };\n  }, [paymentStatus, paymentId, membershipPlan]);",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 50,
            "line": 82
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 38
          }
        },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { userApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\nexport default function RegisterPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n    username: \"\",\n    email: \"\",\n    password: \"\",\n    confirmPassword: \"\",\n    name: \"\",\n    idNumber: \"\",\n    phone: \"\"\n  });\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent\u003cHTMLInputElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    const { id, value } = e.target;\n    setFormData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, [id]: value }));\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\n\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\"\nimport { userApi } from \"@/lib/api\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\n\nexport default function RegisterPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n    username: \"\",\n    email: \"\",\n    password: \"\",\n    confirmPassword: \"\",\n    name: \"\",\n    idNumber: \"\",\n    phone: \"\"\n  });\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent\u003cHTMLInputElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    const { id, value } = e.target;\n    setFormData(prev =\u003e ({ ...prev, [id]: value }));\n  };",
